diff --git a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
index a7c8eb4..f14486d 100644
--- a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
+++ b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
@@ -507,6 +507,83 @@ def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(
     assert pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step") == 9
 
 
+def test_attach_video_render_manifest_prefers_stage7_subtitles_and_stage8_cover_overlay(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest_stage_named.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    task_id = "render-manifest-stage-named-task"
+    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task_id
+    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    stage_dir = task_dir / "_stages"
+    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+    final_video = task_dir / "论坛样本_final.mp4"
+    final_video.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+    (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt").write_text(
+        "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nasr subtitle\n",
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+    (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt").write_text(
+        "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nfinal subtitle\n",
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+    (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass").write_text(
+        "[Script Info]\nTitle: stage6_5 ass\n",
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+    (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_overlay.png").write_bytes(b"overlay")
+    (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").write_text("裁剪文本", encoding="utf-8")
+    state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
+    state_file.write_text(
+        json.dumps(
+            {
+                "last_completed_step": 9,
+                "last_completed_step_name": "stage9_organize",
+                "output_file": str(final_video),
+            },
+            ensure_ascii=False,
+        ),
+        encoding="utf-8",
+    )
+
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id=task_id,
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
+    )
+    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")
+
+    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
+        task,
+        {
+            "success": True,
+            "request_type": "video",
+            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
+            "output_path": str(final_video),
+        },
+    )
+
+    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
+    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
+    assert "subtitle_srt" in roles
+    assert "subtitle_ass" in roles
+    assert "cover_image" in roles
+    assert roles["subtitle_srt"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt"
+    assert roles["subtitle_ass"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass"
+    assert roles["cover_image"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_overlay.png"
+
+    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
+    subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") or {}
+    assert subtitles.get("srt") == roles["subtitle_srt"].get("artifact_id")
+    assert subtitles.get("ass") == roles["subtitle_ass"].get("artifact_id")
+    cover = render_manifest.get("cover") or {}
+    assert cover.get("image") == roles["cover_image"].get("artifact_id")
+
+
 def test_internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)

        self.max_download_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_download_workers", 2)))
        self.max_process_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_process_workers", 2)))
        self.max_upload_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_upload_workers", 2)))
        self.download_timeout_seconds = max(
            30,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("download_timeout_seconds", 600)),
        )
        self.download_chunk_size = max(
            1024,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("download_chunk_size", 8192)),
        )
        self.max_retries_default = max(0, int(self._get_queue_cfg("max_retries", 3)))
        self.retry_backoff_seconds = self._parse_retry_backoff(
            self._get_queue_cfg("retry_backoff_seconds", [5, 10, 20])
        )
        self.upload_retry_backoff_seconds = self._parse_retry_backoff(
            self._get_worker_cfg("upload_retry_backoff_seconds", [1, 2, 4])
        )
        self.retry_check_interval_seconds = max(
            0.2,
            float(self._get_worker_cfg("retry_check_interval_seconds", 1.0)),
        )
        self.zombie_timeout_seconds = max(
            self.download_timeout_seconds,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("zombie_timeout_seconds", 7200)),
        )
        self.zombie_check_interval_seconds = max(
            2.0,
            float(self._get_worker_cfg("zombie_check_interval_seconds", 300.0)),
        )
        self.zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds = self._build_zombie_timeout_by_status()
        self.retry_heap: List[Tuple[float, str]] = []
        self.retry_index: Dict[str, Tuple[float, UnifiedTask]] = {}
        self.active_task_ids: set[str] = set()

        Path(self.config.input_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        Path(self.config.output_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.upload_root = Path(self.config.output_dir) / "_uploaded"
        self.upload_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.upload_storage_backend = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("upload_storage_backend", "local")
        ).strip().lower() or "local"
        if self.upload_storage_backend != "local":
            self.logger.warning(
                "unsupported upload storage backend=%s, fallback to local",
                self.upload_storage_backend,
            )
            self.upload_storage_backend = "local"
        self.storage_adapter: UploadStorageAdapter = build_default_storage_adapter(
            upload_root=str(self.upload_root),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.forum_upload_enabled = self._bool_cfg(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED"),
            bool(self._get_worker_cfg("forum_upload_enabled", True)),
        )
        self.forum_reply_content = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("forum_reply_content", "Video processing completed")
        ).strip() or "Video processing completed"
        self.forum_settings_path = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("forum_settings_path", "config/forum_settings.yaml")
        ).strip() or "config/forum_settings.yaml"

        self.tts_adapter_enabled = self._bool_cfg(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE"),
            bool(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_enable", True)),
        )
        tts_engine_mode_raw = str(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_ENGINE", self._get_worker_cfg("tts_engine", "local"))
        ).strip().lower()
        if tts_engine_mode_raw not in {"local", "http", "auto"}:
            tts_engine_mode_raw = "local"
        self.tts_engine_mode = tts_engine_mode_raw
        tts_default_voice = str(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_default_voice", ""))
        tts_api_endpoint = str(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_api_endpoint", ""))
        tts_api_timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("tts_api_timeout_seconds", 15)
        tts_local_sample_rate_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("tts_local_sample_rate_hz", 24000)
        try:
            tts_api_timeout = float(tts_api_timeout_raw)
        except Exception:
            tts_api_timeout = 15.0
        try:
            tts_local_sample_rate = int(tts_local_sample_rate_raw)
        except Exception:
            tts_local_sample_rate = 24000
        tts_local_sample_rate_env = os.getenv(
            "CLONECUT_TTS_LOCAL_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ",
            str(tts_local_sample_rate),
        )
        try:
            tts_local_sample_rate_value = int(tts_local_sample_rate_env)
        except Exception:
            tts_local_sample_rate_value = tts_local_sample_rate
        self.tts_local_adapter = LocalTtsAdapter(
            enabled=self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            output_dir=self.config.output_dir,
            default_voice=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_DEFAULT_VOICE", tts_default_voice),
            sample_rate_hz=tts_local_sample_rate_value,
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.tts_http_adapter = HttpTtsAdapter(
            enabled=self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            default_voice=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_DEFAULT_VOICE", tts_default_voice),
            api_endpoint=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_API_ENDPOINT", tts_api_endpoint),
            api_timeout_seconds=float(
                os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_API_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", str(tts_api_timeout))
            ),
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        video_cmd = str(self._get_worker_cfg("video_command_template", ""))
        video_timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("video_command_timeout_seconds", 7200)
        try:
            video_timeout = int(video_timeout_raw)
        except Exception:
            video_timeout = 7200
        self.video_adapter = ExternalVideoCommandAdapter(
            output_dir=self.config.output_dir,
            command_template=os.getenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_COMMAND_TEMPLATE", video_cmd),
            timeout_seconds=int(
                os.getenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", str(video_timeout))
            ),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.internal_pipeline_enabled = self._bool_cfg(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_USE_INTERNAL_PIPELINE"),
            bool(self._get_worker_cfg("use_internal_pipeline", False)),
        )

        # --- telemetry ---
        telemetry_interval = float(self._get_worker_cfg("resource_monitor_interval_seconds", 5.0))
        report_dir = str(self._get_worker_cfg("performance_report_dir", "logs/performance_reports"))
        self.resource_monitor = ResourceMonitor(
            interval_seconds=telemetry_interval,
            disk_path=str(self.config.output_dir),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.performance_tracker = PerformanceTracker(resource_monitor=self.resource_monitor)
        self.report_generator = ReportGenerator(report_dir=report_dir, logger=self.logger)

    def start(self) -> None:
        if any(thread.is_alive() for thread in self.worker_threads):
            return

        self.resource_monitor.start()
        recovered = self._recover_stuck_tasks()
        restored_retries = self._restore_retry_schedule()
        self.stop_event.clear()
        self.worker_threads = []
        self._spawn_workers("download", self.max_download_workers, self._download_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("process", self.max_process_workers, self._process_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("upload", self.max_upload_workers, self._upload_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("retry", 1, self._retry_scheduler_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("zombie", 1, self._zombie_cleaner_loop)

        self.logger.info(
            "worker adapters: tts_enabled=%s tts_engine=%s tts_http_ready=%s video_cmd_enabled=%s internal_pipeline=%s redis_registry=%s redis_queue=%s recovered=%s restored_retries=%s",
            self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            self.tts_engine_mode,
            self.tts_http_adapter.is_ready(),
            self.video_adapter.is_enabled(),
            self.internal_pipeline_enabled,
            self.registry.is_persistent(),
            self.use_redis_queue,
            recovered,
            restored_retries,
        )
        self.logger.info(
            "worker pools started: download=%s process=%s upload=%s retry_scheduler=%s zombie_timeout=%ss zombie_by_status=%s video_pipeline_path=%s",
            self.max_download_workers,
            self.max_process_workers,
            self.max_upload_workers,
            1,
            self.zombie_timeout_seconds,
            self.zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds,
            "direct",
        )

    def stop(self) -> None:
        self.stop_event.set()
        for thread in self.worker_threads:
            thread.join(timeout=2.0)
        self.resource_monitor.stop()
        self.logger.info("worker service stopped")

    def submit(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Tuple[bool, str, Optional[str]]:
        try:
            task = self._build_task(raw_data)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return False, "", str(exc)

        existing_task_id = self.queue_adapter.check_duplicate(task)
        if existing_task_id:
            self.logger.info(
                "duplicate task ignored: incoming=%s existing=%s",
                task.task_id,
                existing_task_id,
            )
            return True, existing_task_id, None

        self._persist_task(task)
        self.queue_adapter.remember_dedup(task, ttl_seconds=self.dedup_ttl_seconds)
        self._enqueue_task(self._initial_queue_for_task(task), task)

        with self.lock:
            self.stats["received"] += 1

        self.logger.info(
            "task received: task_id=%s type=%s queued=%s",
            task.task_id,
            task.task_type.value,
            self._initial_queue_for_task(task),
        )
        return True, task.task_id, None

    def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        queue_sizes = self.queue_adapter.get_queue_sizes()
        queued_total = (
            int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0))
            + int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0))
            + int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0))
        )
        task_status_counts = self.get_task_status_counts()

        with self.lock:
            running = sum(self.active_workers.values())
            stats = dict(self.stats)
            active_workers = dict(self.active_workers)
        active_task_count = (
            int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PENDING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.ASSIGNED.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value, 0))
        )
        status_metrics = {
            "total": int(task_status_counts.get("total", 0)),
            "completed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.COMPLETED.value, 0)),
            "failed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.FAILED.value, 0)),
            "active": int(active_task_count),
            "zombie": int(stats["zombie_reclaimed"]),
            "retried": int(stats["retried"]),
            "received": int(stats["received"]),
        }

        return {
            "status": "online",
            "is_busy": running > 0 or queued_total > 0,
            "total_queue_size": queued_total + running,
            "queue_sizes": queue_sizes,
            "queues": {
                "download": int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0)),
                "process": int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0)),
                "upload": int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0)),
                "pending": queued_total,
                "processing": active_workers.get("process", 0),
Tool Result #168 shell_command call_8g98opzUpKTBThIQ4j7dKzd9 exit 0 03:06:52
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations import json import os from pathlib import Path import shutil import subprocess from typing import ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
import subprocess
from typing import Any
from typing import Optional

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path


def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
    return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None


def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    try:
        completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)
        if completed.returncode == 0:
            return True, ""
        return False, completed.stderr or completed.stdout or f"exit={completed.returncode}"
    except Exception as exc:
        return False, str(exc)


def _render_title_overlay_image(output_path: str, width: int, height: int, lines: list[str]) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    # Deterministic placeholder image artifact for compatibility-only phase.
    payload = f"overlay {width}x{height} {' | '.join(lines)}".encode("utf-8")
    Path(output_path).write_bytes(payload)
    return True, ""


def run_stage8_cover(
    input_video: str,
    output_dir: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage8 input missing")

    info = forum_post_info or {}
    raw_cover_titles = info.get("cover_titles") if isinstance(info.get("cover_titles"), list) else []
    cover_titles: list[str] = []
    for item in raw_cover_titles:
        if isinstance(item, dict):
            text = str(item.get("text", "")).strip()
        else:
            text = str(item or "").strip()
        if text:
            cover_titles.append(text)
    if not cover_titles:
        for key in ("cover_title_up", "封面标题上", "cover_title_middle", "封面标题中", "cover_title_down", "封面标题下"):
            text = str(info.get(key, "")).strip()
            if text:
                cover_titles.append(text)

    title_txt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_title", ".txt")
    title_txt.write_text("\n".join(cover_titles) + ("\n" if cover_titles else ""), encoding="utf-8")
    output_video = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover", ".mp4")
    overlay_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_overlay", ".png")
    subtitle_for_timing = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_correct_subtitles", ".srt")
    if not subtitle_for_timing.exists():
        subtitle_for_timing = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".srt")

    method = "title_text_only"
    overlay_duration_seconds = 0.0
    fallback_used = False
    strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    overlay_rendered = False
    overlay_render_error = ""
    overlay_ok, overlay_err = _render_title_overlay_image(str(overlay_path), 1280, 720, cover_titles)
    if overlay_ok and overlay_path.exists():
        overlay_rendered = True
    elif overlay_err:
        overlay_render_error = str(overlay_err)

    if ffmpeg_exists() and overlay_rendered:
        overlay_duration_seconds = 1.7 if subtitle_for_timing.exists() else 2.0
        filter_expr = f"[0:v][1:v]overlay=0:0:enable='between(t,0,{overlay_duration_seconds:.3f})'"
        ok, err = run_ffmpeg(
            ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-i", str(overlay_path), "-filter_complex", filter_expr, str(output_video)]
        )
        if ok and output_video.exists():
            method = "video_title_overlay"
        else:
            fallback_used = True
            shutil.copyfile(source, output_video)
    else:
        fallback_used = True
        if ffmpeg_exists() and not overlay_rendered:
            method = "overlay_render_failed"
        if strict:
            method = "strict_rejected"
        else:
            shutil.copyfile(source, output_video)

    strict_rejected = strict and fallback_used
    payload = {
        "task_id": task_id,
        "cover_titles": cover_titles,
        "cover_title_lines": cover_titles,
        "cover_title_up": str(info.get("cover_title_up", "")),
        "cover_title_middle": str(info.get("cover_title_middle", "")),
        "cover_title_down": str(info.get("cover_title_down", "")),
        "封面标题上": str(info.get("封面标题上", "")),
        "封面标题中": str(info.get("封面标题中", "")),
        "封面标题下": str(info.get("封面标题下", "")),
        "method": method,
        "fallback_used": fallback_used,
        "strict_rejected": strict_rejected,
        "overlay_duration_seconds": overlay_duration_seconds,
        "overlay_rendered": overlay_rendered,
        "overlay_render_error": overlay_render_error,
        "overlay_path": str(overlay_path) if overlay_rendered else "",
    }
    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_manifest", ".json")
    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return StageResult(
        success=not strict_rejected,
        output_file=str(output_video if output_video.exists() else source),
        error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage8 fallback" if strict_rejected else None,
        artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path), "title_file": str(title_txt)},
    )


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage8_cover(*args, **kwargs)

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import threading
import json
from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace
import time

import apps.worker.service as worker_service_module
import pytest
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskType, UnifiedTask


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace="clonecut_worker_test:",
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 1,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "use_internal_pipeline": True,
                "video_command_template": "",
            },
        },
    )


def _build_task(source: Path) -> UnifiedTask:
    return UnifiedTask(
        task_id="video-task-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit-test",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={},
        metadata={},
    )


def test_worker_runtime_has_no_legacy_pre_main_pipeline_imports() -> None:
    repo_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
    legacy_runner = repo_root / "apps" / "worker" / "internal_pipeline_runner.py"
    assert legacy_runner.exists() is False

    service_source = (repo_root / "apps" / "worker" / "service.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    assert "domain.video.pre.main" not in service_source
    assert "run_pipeline_request(" not in service_source
    assert "warm_pipeline_runtime(" not in service_source


def test_worker_service_start_and_stop_skips_legacy_warm_runner_lifecycle(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runner_lifecycle.db"))
    events: list[str] = []

    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))
    service.resource_monitor = SimpleNamespace(
        start=lambda: events.append("resource_start"),
        stop=lambda: events.append("resource_stop"),
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_recover_stuck_tasks", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_restore_retry_schedule", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_spawn_workers", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None)

    service.start()
    service.stop()

    assert events == [
        "resource_start",
        "resource_stop",
    ]


def test_worker_video_runtime_ready_gate_only_blocks_video_tasks(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_ready_gate.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    video_task = UnifiedTask(task_id="video-ready-1", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test")
    tts_task = UnifiedTask(task_id="tts-ready-1", task_type=TaskType.TTS, source="unit-test")

    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_ensure_video_pipeline_runtime_ready", lambda *args, **kwargs: False)

    assert service._can_start_process_task(tts_task) is True
    assert service._can_start_process_task(video_task) is False


def test_worker_video_runtime_reuses_warmed_pipeline_instance(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_singleton.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source_a = tmp_path / "source-a.mp4"
    source_b = tmp_path / "source-b.mp4"
    source_a.write_bytes(b"video-a" * 64)
    source_b.write_bytes(b"video-b" * 64)

    counters = {"warm": 0, "init": 0, "run": 0}

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        @staticmethod
        def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            counters["warm"] += 1
            return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}

        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor
            counters["init"] += 1

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = start_from_stage
            _ = forum_post_info
            counters["run"] += 1
            output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / task_id / "final.mp4"
            output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            output.write_bytes(b"done")
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(output),
                executed_stages=["stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)

    task_a = UnifiedTask(task_id="video-runtime-a", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source_a))
    task_b = UnifiedTask(task_id="video-runtime-b", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source_b))

    result_a = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task_a, str(source_a))
    result_b = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task_b, str(source_b))

    assert result_a["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"
    assert result_b["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"
    assert counters == {"warm": 1, "init": 1, "run": 2}


def test_worker_video_runtime_auto_rebuilds_after_warm_failure(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_rebuild.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["video_pipeline_warm_retry_seconds"] = 0.1
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_spawn_workers", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None)

    counters = {"warm": 0, "init": 0}

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        @staticmethod
        def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            counters["warm"] += 1
            if counters["warm"] == 1:
                raise RuntimeError("warm failed once")
            return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}

        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor
            counters["init"] += 1

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)

    service.start()
    try:
        deadline = time.time() + 3.0
        runtime_status = {}
        while time.time() < deadline:
            runtime_status = service.get_status().get("video_pipeline_runtime") or {}
            if runtime_status.get("ready") is True:
                break
            time.sleep(0.05)

        assert runtime_status.get("ready") is True
        assert counters["warm"] >= 2
        assert counters["init"] == 1
        assert runtime_status.get("last_error") in {"", None}
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_worker_video_runtime_concurrency_limit_serializes_pipeline_runs(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_concurrency.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["video_pipeline_max_concurrency"] = 1
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    active = {"current": 0, "max": 0}
    active_lock = threading.Lock()
    start_event = threading.Event()
    failures: list[str] = []

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        @staticmethod
        def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}

        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = start_from_stage
            _ = forum_post_info
            with active_lock:
                active["current"] += 1
                active["max"] = max(active["max"], active["current"])
            time.sleep(0.15)
            with active_lock:
                active["current"] -= 1
            output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / task_id / "final.mp4"
            output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            output.write_bytes(b"done")
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(output),
                executed_stages=["stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)

    def run_task(task_id: str) -> None:
        source = tmp_path / f"{task_id}.mp4"
        source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
        task = UnifiedTask(task_id=task_id, task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source))
        start_event.wait(timeout=1.0)
        try:
            service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
        except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - defensive capture for threaded assertion
            failures.append(str(exc))

    threads = [
        threading.Thread(target=run_task, args=("video-concurrency-a",), daemon=True),
        threading.Thread(target=run_task, args=("video-concurrency-b",), daemon=True),
    ]
    for thread in threads:
        thread.start()
    start_event.set()
    for thread in threads:
        thread.join(timeout=2.0)

    assert failures == []
    assert active["max"] == 1


def test_run_internal_pipeline_ignores_legacy_warm_runner_and_uses_video_pipeline(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "video_pipeline_direct.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
    expected_output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "final.mp4"
    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor
            captured["output_dir"] = config.output_dir

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            expected_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            expected_output.write_bytes(b"done")
            captured["input_video"] = input_video
            captured["task_id"] = task_id
            captured["start_from_stage"] = start_from_stage
            captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(expected_output),
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode", "stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess should not run")),
    )

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))

    assert captured["output_dir"] == str(service.config.output_dir)
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == "video-task-1"
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert result["output_path"] == str(expected_output)
    assert result["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    ("failed_stage", "current_stage", "expected_step", "expected_name"),
    [
        ("stage6_clip", 6, 5, "stage5_ai_text"),
        ("stage6_5_resub", 7, 6, "stage6_clip"),
        ("stage7_correct", 8, 6, "stage6_5_resub"),
        ("stage7_subtitle", 9, 6, "stage6_5_resub"),
        ("stage8_cover", 10, 7, "stage7_subtitle"),
        ("stage0_clean", 0, -1, ""),
    ],
)
def test_run_internal_pipeline_failure_reports_last_completed_legacy_step(
    monkeypatch,
    tmp_path,
    failed_stage: str,
    current_stage: int,
    expected_step: int,
    expected_name: str,
) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    db_name = failed_stage.replace(".", "_")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / f"{db_name}.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)

    class FailingVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = task_id
            _ = start_from_stage
            _ = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=False,
                output_file="",
                error_message=f"{failed_stage} failed",
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode"],
                performance_summary="failed",
                current_stage=current_stage,
                last_stage="",
                failed_stage=failed_stage,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FailingVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess fallback should not run")),
    )

    try:
        service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        assert f"{failed_stage} failed" in str(exc)
    else:
        raise AssertionError("expected video pipeline failure")

    state_payload = json.loads(
        (Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "state.json").read_text(
            encoding="utf-8"
        )
    )
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step"] == expected_step
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step_name"] == expected_name

Output:
        )
        self.performance_tracker = PerformanceTracker(resource_monitor=self.resource_monitor)
        self.report_generator = ReportGenerator(report_dir=report_dir, logger=self.logger)

    def start(self) -> None:
        if any(thread.is_alive() for thread in self.worker_threads):
            return

        self.resource_monitor.start()
        recovered = self._recover_stuck_tasks()
        restored_retries = self._restore_retry_schedule()
        self.stop_event.clear()
        self.worker_threads = []
        self._spawn_workers("download", self.max_download_workers, self._download_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("process", self.max_process_workers, self._process_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("upload", self.max_upload_workers, self._upload_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("retry", 1, self._retry_scheduler_loop)
        self._spawn_workers("zombie", 1, self._zombie_cleaner_loop)

        self.logger.info(
            "worker adapters: tts_enabled=%s tts_engine=%s tts_http_ready=%s video_cmd_enabled=%s internal_pipeline=%s redis_registry=%s redis_queue=%s recovered=%s restored_retries=%s",
            self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            self.tts_engine_mode,
            self.tts_http_adapter.is_ready(),
            self.video_adapter.is_enabled(),
            self.internal_pipeline_enabled,
            self.registry.is_persistent(),
            self.use_redis_queue,
            recovered,
            restored_retries,
        )
        self.logger.info(
            "worker pools started: download=%s process=%s upload=%s retry_scheduler=%s zombie_timeout=%ss zombie_by_status=%s video_pipeline_path=%s",
            self.max_download_workers,
            self.max_process_workers,
            self.max_upload_workers,
            1,
            self.zombie_timeout_seconds,
            self.zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds,
            "direct",
        )

    def stop(self) -> None:
        self.stop_event.set()
        for thread in self.worker_threads:
            thread.join(timeout=2.0)
        self.resource_monitor.stop()
        self.logger.info("worker service stopped")

    def submit(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Tuple[bool, str, Optional[str]]:
        try:
            task = self._build_task(raw_data)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return False, "", str(exc)

        existing_task_id = self.queue_adapter.check_duplicate(task)
        if existing_task_id:
            self.logger.info(
                "duplicate task ignored: incoming=%s existing=%s",
                task.task_id,
                existing_task_id,
            )
            return True, existing_task_id, None

        self._persist_task(task)
        self.queue_adapter.remember_dedup(task, ttl_seconds=self.dedup_ttl_seconds)
        self._enqueue_task(self._initial_queue_for_task(task), task)

        with self.lock:
            self.stats["received"] += 1

        self.logger.info(
            "task received: task_id=%s type=%s queued=%s",
            task.task_id,
            task.task_type.value,
            self._initial_queue_for_task(task),
        )
        return True, task.task_id, None

    def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        queue_sizes = self.queue_adapter.get_queue_sizes()
        queued_total = (
            int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0))
            + int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0))
            + int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0))
        )
        task_status_counts = self.get_task_status_counts()

        with self.lock:
            running = sum(self.active_workers.values())
            stats = dict(self.stats)
            active_workers = dict(self.active_workers)
        active_task_count = (
            int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PENDING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.ASSIGNED.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value, 0))
            + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value, 0))
        )
        status_metrics = {
            "total": int(task_status_counts.get("total", 0)),
            "completed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.COMPLETED.value, 0)),
            "failed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.FAILED.value, 0)),
            "active": int(active_task_count),
            "zombie": int(stats["zombie_reclaimed"]),
            "retried": int(stats["retried"]),
            "received": int(stats["received"]),
        }

        return {
            "status": "online",
            "is_busy": running > 0 or queued_total > 0,
            "total_queue_size": queued_total + running,
            "queue_sizes": queue_sizes,
            "queues": {
                "download": int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0)),
                "process": int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0)),
                "upload": int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0)),
                "pending": queued_total,
                "processing": active_workers.get("process", 0),
                "completed": stats["completed"],
                "failed": stats["failed"],
                "retried": stats["retried"],
                "received": stats["received"],
                "active": active_task_count,
                "total": int(task_status_counts.get("total", 0)),
                "zombie_reclaimed": stats["zombie_reclaimed"],
                "zombie": stats["zombie_reclaimed"],
            },
            "workers": active_workers,
            "status_metrics": status_metrics,
            "task_status_counts": task_status_counts,
            "uptime_seconds": int(max(0, time.time() - self.booted_at)),
            "timestamp": time.time(),
        }

    def get_resources(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return self.resource_monitor.get_current()

    def get_resources_history(self, minutes: int = 60) -> list:
        return self.resource_monitor.get_history(minutes=minutes)

    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        task = self.registry.get(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return None
        return task.to_dict()

    def get_task_status_counts(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
        counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
        for status in self._queryable_statuses():
            counts[status.value] = int(self.registry.count_by_status(status))
        counts["total"] = sum(counts.values())
        return counts

    def list_tasks(
        self,
        status: Optional[str] = None,
        limit: int = 20,
        offset: int = 0,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        size = max(1, min(200, int(limit)))
        start = max(0, int(offset))
        target_statuses = self._resolve_status_filter(status)
        read_limit = min(5000, start + size)

        if len(target_statuses) == 1:
            selected = target_statuses[0]
            total = int(self.registry.count_by_status(selected))
            tasks = self.registry.list_by_status(selected, limit=max(1, read_limit))
        else:
            total = 0
            merged: Dict[str, UnifiedTask] = {}
            for st in target_statuses:
                total += int(self.registry.count_by_status(st))
                for task in self.registry.list_by_status(st, limit=max(1, read_limit)):
                    merged[task.task_id] = task
            tasks = list(merged.values())
            tasks.sort(key=lambda item: item.created_at, reverse=True)

        selected_tasks = tasks[start : start + size]
        return {
            "total": total,
            "limit": size,
            "offset": start,
            "tasks": [item.to_dict() for item in selected_tasks],
        }

    def cancel_task(self, task_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        task = self.registry.get(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return False, "task not found"
        if task.status == TaskStatus.CANCELLED:
            return True, ""
        if task.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED:
            return False, "completed task cannot be cancelled"
        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING, TaskStatus.PROCESSING, TaskStatus.UPLOADING}:
            return False, f"task is running in status={task.status.value}, cannot be cancelled safely"

        transitioned = self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.CANCELLED, strict=False)
        if not transitioned:
            return False, f"illegal transition: {task.status.value} -> cancelled"
        task.stage_checkpoint = "cancelled"
        task.error_message = None
        task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
        task.metadata["cancelled_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
        self._persist_task(task)
        return True, ""

    def retry_task(self, task_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        task = self.registry.get(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return False, "task not found"
        if task.status != TaskStatus.FAILED:
            return False, f"only failed task can retry, current={task.status.value}"

        self._remove_retry_schedule(task.task_id)
        if int(task.retry_count) >= int(task.max_retries):
            task.max_retries = int(task.retry_count) + 1

        task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
        task.metadata["manual_retry"] = True
        task.metadata["manual_retry_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
        self._enqueue_retry_task(task)
        with self.lock:
            self.stats["retried"] += 1
        return True, ""

    def _download_loop(self) -> None:
        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            task = self._dequeue_stage_task("download")
            if task is None:
                continue
            self._mark_stage_active("download", +1)
            self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, True)
            try:
                self._run_download_stage(task)
            finally:
                self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, False)
                self._mark_stage_active("download", -1)

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
            output_path = str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip()
            if not output_path:
                attempts.append(f"{engine_name}: empty output_path")
                continue
            result = dict(result)
            result.setdefault("tts_engine_selected", engine_name)
            task.current_stage = 9
            task.stage_checkpoint = f"tts_{engine_name}_completed"
            return result
        raise RuntimeError("tts processing failed: " + " | ".join(attempts))

    def _select_tts_adapters(self) -> List[Tuple[str, Any]]:
        if self.tts_engine_mode == "http":
            return [("http", self.tts_http_adapter)]
        if self.tts_engine_mode == "auto":
            return [
                ("local", self.tts_local_adapter),
                ("http", self.tts_http_adapter),
            ]
        return [("local", self.tts_local_adapter)]

    def _process_video_like(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        source_path = str(task.source_path or "").strip()
        use_internal = self.internal_pipeline_enabled or not self.video_adapter.is_enabled()
        if use_internal:
            if not source_path or not Path(source_path).exists():
                raise RuntimeError("internal pipeline requires a valid source_path")
            engine = "internal_pipeline"
            if not self.internal_pipeline_enabled:
                engine = "internal_pipeline_auto"
            result = self._run_internal_video_pipeline(task=task, source_path=source_path)
            result["engine"] = engine
            return result

        if self.video_adapter.is_enabled():
            result = self.video_adapter.process(task)
            task.current_stage = 9
            task.stage_checkpoint = "video_command"
            return result

        raise RuntimeError("no video engine configured")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
        task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        source = Path(source_path)
        if not source.exists():
            task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
            task.current_stage = 0
            raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")
        stage_names = list(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)
        start_from_stage = 0
        self._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)

        if self._should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(source):
            return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
                task=task,
                source=source,
                task_dir=task_dir,
                stage_names=stage_names,
                start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
                reason="migration fallback: tiny input",
            )

        pipeline = VideoPipeline(
            config=VideoPipelineConfig.from_env(output_dir=str(self.config.output_dir)),
            logger=self.logger,
            performance_tracker=self.performance_tracker,
            resource_monitor=self.resource_monitor,
        )
        started = time.perf_counter()
        pipeline_result = pipeline.run(
            input_video=str(source),
            task_id=task.task_id,
            start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
            forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
            if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
            else {},
        )
        elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))

        last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
        failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
        checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
        if checkpoint:
            task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
        task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
        succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))

        output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()
        self._write_internal_pipeline_state(
            task_dir=task_dir,
            output_path=output_path,
            stage_name=checkpoint,
            current_stage=task.current_stage,
            failed_stage=failed_stage,
            succeeded=succeeded,
        )

        if not succeeded:
            error_message = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "error_message", "") or "").strip()
            raise RuntimeError(error_message or "video pipeline failed")

        return {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": task.task_type.value,
            "output_path": output_path,
            "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
            "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",
            "performance_summary": (
                str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
                or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
            ),
        }

    def _should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(self, source: Path) -> bool:
        threshold_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes", 0)
        try:
            threshold = max(0, int(threshold_raw))
        except Exception:
            threshold = 0
        if threshold <= 0:
            return False
        try:
            return source.stat().st_size <= threshold
        except Exception:
            return False

    def _write_internal_pipeline_state(
        self,
        *,
        task_dir: Path,
        output_path: str,
        stage_name: str,
        current_stage: int,
        failed_stage: str = "",
        succeeded: bool = True,
    ) -> None:
        last_successful_stage = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_last_successful_stage_name(
            stage_name=stage_name,
            failed_stage=failed_stage if not succeeded else "",
            current_stage=current_stage,
        )
        completed_step, completed_stage_name = INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE.get(
            last_successful_stage,
            (-1, ""),
        )
        payload = {
            "last_completed_step": int(completed_step),
            "last_completed_step_name": completed_stage_name,
            "output_file": output_path,
        }
        state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
        state_path.write_text(
            json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_last_successful_stage_name(
        self,
        *,
        stage_name: str,
        failed_stage: str,
        current_stage: int,
    ) -> str:
        stage_index = {name: idx for idx, name in enumerate(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)}
        current_name = str(stage_name or "").strip()
        failed_name = str(failed_stage or "").strip()

        if failed_name:
            if current_name and current_name != failed_name:
                return current_name
            failed_idx = stage_index.get(failed_name)
            if failed_idx is not None:
                if failed_idx == 0:
                    return ""
                return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[failed_idx - 1]
            if int(current_stage) <= 0:
                return ""
            fallback_idx = min(len(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER) - 1, int(current_stage) - 1)
            return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[fallback_idx]

        if current_name:
            return current_name
        fallback_idx = max(0, min(len(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER) - 1, int(current_stage)))
        return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[fallback_idx]

    def _prepare_internal_pipeline_context(self, task: UnifiedTask, task_dir: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        payload = task.payload if isinstance(task.payload, dict) else {}
        metadata = task.metadata if isinstance(task.metadata, dict) else {}
        options: Dict[str, Any] = {}

        forum_info = self._normalize_forum_post_info(payload=payload, metadata=metadata)
        if isinstance(payload.get("forum_post_info"), dict):
            forum_info.update(payload.get("forum_post_info") or {})
        if isinstance(metadata.get("forum_post_info"), dict):
            forum_info.update(metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})

        original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
            forum_post_info=forum_info,
            payload=payload,
            metadata=metadata,
            source_url=str(task.source_url or ""),
        )
        if original_filename:
            forum_info["original_filename"] = original_filename

        if forum_info:
            forum_post_info_path = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
            forum_post_info_path.write_text(
                json.dumps(forum_info, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
                encoding="utf-8",
            )
            options["forum_post_info_json"] = str(forum_post_info_path)

            next_metadata = dict(metadata)
            next_payload = dict(payload)
            next_metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
            next_metadata["internal_pipeline_forum_post_info_path"] = str(forum_post_info_path)
            next_payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
            task.metadata = next_metadata
            task.payload = next_payload
            metadata = next_metadata
            payload = next_payload

        clip_text = self._pick_first_text(
            payload.get("clip_text"),
            metadata.get("clip_text"),
        )
        if clip_text:
            clip_text_path = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
            clip_text_path.write_text(clip_text, encoding="utf-8")
            options["clip_text_file"] = str(clip_text_path)
        else:
            clip_text_file = self._pick_first_text(
                payload.get("clip_text_file"),
                metadata.get("clip_text_file"),
            )
            if clip_text_file and Path(clip_text_file).exists():
                clip_text_path = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
                source_path = Path(clip_text_file)
                if source_path.resolve() != clip_text_path.resolve():
                    shutil.copyfile(source_path, clip_text_path)
                options["clip_text_file"] = str(clip_text_path)

        return options

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
            "*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        source: Path,
        task_dir: Path,
        stage_names: List[str],
        start_from_stage: int,
        reason: str,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        stage_dir = task_dir / "_stages"
        stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        output_path = task_dir / f"{task.task_id}{source.suffix or '.mp4'}"
        shutil.copy2(source, output_path)

        asr_srt = stage_dir / f"{task.task_id}_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
        asr_srt.write_text(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    "1",
                    "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
                    "internal pipeline fallback subtitle",
                    "",
                ]
            ),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        cover_manifest = stage_dir / f"{task.task_id}_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
        cover_manifest.write_text(
            json.dumps(
                {
                    "task_id": task.task_id,
                    "engine": "internal_pipeline_fallback",
                    "cover_titles": [],
                    "fallback_reason": reason,
                },
                ensure_ascii=False,
                indent=2,
            ),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )

        executed = stage_names[start_from_stage:]
        task.current_stage = len(stage_names) - 1
        task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[-1]
        return {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": task.task_type.value,
            "output_path": str(output_path),
            "executed_stages": executed,
            "executed_mode": "fallback_copy",
            "performance_summary": (
                f"internal pipeline fallback executed stages={len(executed)} reason={reason}"
            ),
        }

    def _build_task(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> UnifiedTask:
        payload = dict(data.get("payload") or {})
        metadata = dict(data.get("metadata") or {})
        source_path = str(
            data.get("source_path")
            or payload.get("source_path")
            or metadata.get("source_path")
            or ""
        ).strip()
        source_url = (
            data.get("url")
            or data.get("source_url")
            or data.get("post_url")
            or metadata.get("post_url")
            or ""
        )

        task_type = parse_task_type(data.get("task_type", metadata.get("task_type", "video")))
        if task_type == TaskType.VIDEO and not source_url and not source_path:
            raise ValueError("missing source url/source path for video task")

        source_url = self._resolve_video_source_url(

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import logging
import os
from typing import Any
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    @app.get("/")
    def dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/web/worker")
    def worker_dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/health")
    def health() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"status": "ok"})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/status")
    def mock_worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **build_worker_status()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/resources")
    def mock_worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": build_worker_resources()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_tasks() -> Any:
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "10")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
        except ValueError:
            limit = 10
        tasks = build_worker_tasks(limit=limit)
        return jsonify({"success": True, "tasks": tasks, "total": len(tasks), "limit": limit, "offset": 0})

    @app.post("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_submit() -> Any:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        source_url = str(payload.get("source_url", "")).strip()
        if not source_url:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "missing source_url"}), 400
        task_id = f"mock-submit-{datetime.now().strftime('%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.post("/api/worker/receive-task")
    def receive_task() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"})

    def _list_tasks_impl() -> Any:
        status = request.args.get("status")
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
        offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
            offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400

        try:
            payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})

    def _create_task_impl() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"}), 201

    @app.get("/api/worker/status")
    def worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/status")
    def status_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/worker/resources")
    def worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/resources")
    def resources_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_tasks() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.get("/api/tasks")
    def tasks_compat() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.post("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_create_task() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.post("/api/tasks")
    def create_task_compat() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.get("/api/worker/task/<task_id>")
    def worker_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut worker service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "worker"
    if args.port:
        cfg.port = args.port
    if args.host:
        cfg.host = args.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.worker")
    logger.info("worker booting")
    logger.info("env=%s role=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.role, cfg.host, cfg.port)
    logger.info(
        "redis=%s:%s db=%s ns=%s",
        cfg.redis_host,
        cfg.redis_port,
        cfg.redis_db,
        cfg.redis_namespace,
    )

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    service.start()
    app = create_app(service)

    _run_http(app=app, host=cfg.host, port=cfg.port, logger=logger)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-156/test_worker_video_runtime_reus0')

    def test_worker_video_runtime_reuses_warmed_pipeline_instance(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_singleton.db"))
        service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))
    
        source_a = tmp_path / "source-a.mp4"
        source_b = tmp_path / "source-b.mp4"
        source_a.write_bytes(b"video-a" * 64)
        source_b.write_bytes(b"video-b" * 64)
    
        counters = {"warm": 0, "init": 0, "run": 0}
    
        class FakeVideoPipeline:
            @staticmethod
            def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                counters["warm"] += 1
                return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}
    
            def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                _ = performance_tracker
                _ = resource_monitor
                counters["init"] += 1
    
            def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = input_video
                _ = start_from_stage
                _ = forum_post_info
                counters["run"] += 1
                output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / task_id / "final.mp4"
                output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                output.write_bytes(b"done")
                return SimpleNamespace(
                    success=True,
                    output_file=str(output),
                    executed_stages=["stage9_organize"],
                    performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                    current_stage=11,
                    last_stage="stage9_organize",
                    failed_stage=None,
                    performance_report=None,
                )
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    
        task_a = UnifiedTask(task_id="video-runtime-a", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source_a))
        task_b = UnifiedTask(task_id="video-runtime-b", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source_b))
    
        result_a = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task_a, str(source_a))
        result_b = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task_b, str(source_b))
    
        assert result_a["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"
        assert result_b["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-156/test_worker_video_runtime_auto0')

    def test_worker_video_runtime_auto_rebuilds_after_warm_failure(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_rebuild.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["video_pipeline_warm_retry_seconds"] = 0.1
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
        monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_spawn_workers", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None)
    
        counters = {"warm": 0, "init": 0}
    
        class FakeVideoPipeline:
            @staticmethod
            def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                counters["warm"] += 1
                if counters["warm"] == 1:
                    raise RuntimeError("warm failed once")
                return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}
    
            def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                _ = performance_tracker
                _ = resource_monitor
                counters["init"] += 1
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    
        service.start()
        try:
            deadline = time.time() + 3.0
            runtime_status = {}
            while time.time() < deadline:
                runtime_status = service.get_status().get("video_pipeline_runtime") or {}
                if runtime_status.get("ready") is True:
                    break
                time.sleep(0.05)

monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x000001B2B06DE380>
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-156/test_worker_video_runtime_conc0')

    def test_worker_video_runtime_concurrency_limit_serializes_pipeline_runs(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runtime_concurrency.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["video_pipeline_max_concurrency"] = 1
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
    
        active = {"current": 0, "max": 0}
        active_lock = threading.Lock()
        start_event = threading.Event()
        failures: list[str] = []
    
        class FakeVideoPipeline:
            @staticmethod
            def warm_resources(config, logger=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                return {"stage4_asr": {"ready": True}}
    
            def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = config
                _ = logger
                _ = performance_tracker
                _ = resource_monitor
    
            def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
                _ = input_video
                _ = start_from_stage
                _ = forum_post_info
                with active_lock:
                    active["current"] += 1
                    active["max"] = max(active["max"], active["current"])
                time.sleep(0.15)
                with active_lock:
                    active["current"] -= 1
                output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / task_id / "final.mp4"
                output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                output.write_bytes(b"done")
                return SimpleNamespace(
                    success=True,
                    output_file=str(output),
                    executed_stages=["stage9_organize"],
                    performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                    current_stage=11,
                    last_stage="stage9_organize",
                    failed_stage=None,
                    performance_report=None,
                )
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    
        def run_task(task_id: str) -> None:
            source = tmp_path / f"{task_id}.mp4"
            source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
            task = UnifiedTask(task_id=task_id, task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit-test", source_path=str(source))
            start_event.wait(timeout=1.0)
            try:
                service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
            except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - defensive capture for threaded assertion
                failures.append(str(exc))
    
        threads = [
            threading.Thread(target=run_task, args=("video-concurrency-a",), daemon=True),
            threading.Thread(target=run_task, args=("video-concurrency-b",), daemon=True),
        ]
        for thread in threads:
            thread.start()
        start_event.set()
        for thread in threads:
            thread.join(timeout=2.0)
    
        assert failures == []
>       assert active["max"] == 1
E       assert 2 == 1
