d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:21:- OpenClaw 结果消费层：已在仓库内提供 `openclaw_result` 标准结果对象、本地客户端/CLI、以及 workspace skill + PowerShell wrapper；下一步转向用户实际 OpenClaw 工作区/频道中的最终使用方式固化，而不再依赖人工记忆调用参数。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:39:- 完成 API 侧第一版 OpenClaw 接线：`apps/api/main.py` 新增 `/api/tasks/upload` 与 `/api/tasks/upload-video` multipart 上传接口，将视频落盘到 `input/_api_uploads/<task_id>/` 后通过 `source_path` 提交到现有 worker 队列；同时新增 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/download` 用于回传主产物。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:43:- 完成 OpenClaw 友好结果对象首版：worker 已补齐 `clip_text.txt` / `forum_post_info.json` / 日志等关键资产收集，API 已新增 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/openclaw-result`，真实 `test.mp4` smoke 能直接返回主成片、字幕、封面、裁剪文本、论坛上下文和处理日志的标准结果对象。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:44:- 完成调用侧首版落地：新增 `apps/api/openclaw_client.py` 与 `scripts/openclaw_task_client.py`，可直接执行“上传视频 -> 轮询任务 -> 获取 `openclaw_result`”；已用真实 `test.mp4` 通过本地 HTTP API 跑通 CLI smoke。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:45:- 完成 OpenClaw 外侧入口首版：新增 `scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1` 和 `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/SKILL.md`，OpenClaw agent 可通过固定命令触发 CloneCut 视频生产链；已用真实 `test.mp4` 跑通 wrapper smoke。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v2.md:47:- 使用真实 Docker OpenClaw workspace 对 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 完成重新 smoke：任务 `c4bc2d74-99b6-4239-8ca1-555f99f8d9f8` 于 2026-03-26 17:03:38 开始处理、17:04:41 完成，`openclaw_result` 返回 `executed_mode=real_pipeline` 与 13 个 artifacts，确认成片、字幕、封面、剪辑文本和日志均可稳定回传。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-26_113357.md:6:助手: 已将上一阶段改动提交为 `cae7b33 feat: prepare openclaw pipeline bridge and docker smoke`，随后明确当前 V1 核心目标是“用户通过 OpenClaw 发送视频与自然语言意图，由 clonecut 执行现有 `pre` 生产链完成去气口、重复/停顿处理、剪辑、字幕、封面和成片输出，再把结果返回给 OpenClaw 继续展示与迭代”。在该目标下继续推进代码，已在 `apps/api/main.py` 新增 multipart 视频上传建任务接口 `/api/tasks/upload` 和 `/api/tasks/upload-video`，把上传文件落到 `input/_api_uploads/<task_id>/` 后用 `source_path` 提交给现有 worker；同时新增 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/download` 用于回传主产物，并用 Flask test client 做了接口级 smoke test，验证上传建任务与下载主产物都工作正常。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-26_153437.md:6:助手: 先将第二轮产品代码与测试提交为 `2b42a9b feat: add openclaw result client workflow`，随后继续推进 OpenClaw 外侧接入：新增 `scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1` 包装脚本与 `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/SKILL.md`，让 OpenClaw agent 可通过固定入口触发 CloneCut 视频生产链；并使用真实 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 跑通 wrapper smoke，确认能返回最终成片、字幕、裁剪文本与封面图等结构化结果。
d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-26_170600.md:6:助手: 重新核对 API、WorkerService 与 Docker OpenClaw 运行状态后，确认根因是 `apps/api/main.py` 创建了 `WorkerService` 但没有调用 `service.start()`，导致视频上传接口虽能收任务，后台却没有 worker 消费，任务长期停留在 `pending/process queue`。随后修复 API 生命周期并新增 `tests/unit/test_api_main_lifecycle.py`，在 `.venv-t13` 中通过定向测试验证。接着按现有环境变量重新拉起本机 API，再从 Docker 容器 `openclaw_docker_test-openclaw-gateway-1` 内使用 `run_clonecut_task.mjs` 提交真实 `test.mp4`，成功观察到任务 `c4bc2d74-99b6-4239-8ca1-555f99f8d9f8` 从 `processing` 进入 `completed`，最终返回 `executed_mode=real_pipeline` 的标准 `openclaw_result`，包含主成片、字幕、封面图、剪辑文本、论坛上下文与日志等 13 个 artifacts，确认“OpenClaw 上传视频 -> CloneCut 现有 pre 生产链处理 -> 返回结构化结果”链路已真实跑通。

# 椤圭洰鐩爣 v2

## 鍏冧俊鎭?

Output:
# 项目待办

## 绑定信息
- 目标版本: goal_v2
- 待办版本: v2_3
- 创建日期: 2026-03-27
- 状态: 当前生效

## 当前阶段结论
- 方案B已确定为当前执行路线：以 `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` 作为唯一生产主链，禁止旧架构级兜底，禁止长期双轨运行。
- 当前阻塞点不是 OpenClaw 接口层，而是内置视频流水线本体未完成：`domain/video/pipeline.py` 依赖的 `domain/video/stages/` 缺失。
- 上一阶段成果已独立提交并推送：`9a0d91a feat: add warm internal pipeline runner`。
- Redis 继续采用宿主机服务化方式，不以 Docker 部署为未来前提。
- 当前测试已锁定的 `strict_rejected`、`timeline_fallback`、`copy_fallback`、`rule_based` 等行为，在等价替代契约落地前继续按正式运行时保护处理，不视为旧架构兜底。
- OpenClaw 只是第一层 skill 适配平台，不是系统唯一宿主；方案B新增明确三层结构：平台无关核心能力层、API/CLI 通用入口层、Skill/Wrapper 适配层。

## 里程碑
- [x] 完成 OpenClaw 第一版与现有 `pre` 生产链的端到端打通
- [x] 完成 warm runner 试验并独立提交归档
- [x] 明确当前核心目的：用户经 OpenClaw 提交视频，CloneCut 完成“去气口/重复内容 -> 剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面 -> 回传产物”
- [x] 输出方案B实施方案文档与执行待办清单
- [ ] 重建 `domain/video/stages/` 并恢复 `VideoPipeline` 可运行骨架
- [ ] 将 worker 真实执行路径切换到 `VideoPipeline`
- [ ] 用 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 完成 OpenClaw 新主链 smoke test
- [ ] 下线旧 `pre` 主链的运行时依赖

## 当前进行中
- 方案B Phase 0：冻结边界与执行口径，文档化“单一路径、禁止旧架构级兜底、保留明确报错保护、worker 内常驻预热”的新设计。
- 方案B Phase 1 准备启动：按测试和 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 的目标接口重建 `domain/video/stages/`，并先补最小可运行骨架；后续在主链收敛后建立平台无关 API/CLI 和多平台 skill 适配层。

## 已完成
- 已确认当前真实运行链仍由 `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py` 驱动，OpenClaw 已可通过现有 API/worker 跑通真实 `test.mp4`。
- 已在 Windows 宿主机安装并跑通本地 Redis，当前 API 已运行在 Redis 队列/注册模式。
- 已完成结果协议首轮收敛，OpenClaw 可获取 `openclaw_result` 与关键 artifacts。
- 已验证 warm runner 能显著减少“每任务重新起解释器”的额外开销，但该方案仅作为上一阶段试验结果保留，不进入方案B主设计。
- 已重建 `.venv-p310` 运行环境，并修复旧 `pre` 内置流水线在新环境下的两个关键运行时问题：子进程输出编码导致的 warm runner 失败，以及 `ffmpeg` 隐式路径依赖导致的 step6 中断；`test.mp4` 已于 2026-03-27 通过 OpenClaw -> CloneCut -> 回传链路再次验证，结果为 `executed_mode=real_pipeline`。

## 待完成
- 重建 `domain/video/stages/base.py`、`utils.py` 与各 stage 模块，恢复 `domain.video.pipeline` 的可导入与可测试状态。
- 对照 `domain/video/pre/stage/*` 迁移主链算法，去除交互式输入和脚本式副作用。
- 将 ASR、VideoClipper、字幕处理、封面渲染等重资源收敛为 worker 进程内常驻资源，并补齐并发治理与 ready 信号。
- 修改 `apps/worker/service.py`，让通用视频任务主路径直接调用 `VideoPipeline`。
- 建立平台无关 API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用通用入口，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
- 用 OpenClaw 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
- 清理旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 在 worker 主路径上的运行时依赖，并单独决策 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是迁移期兼容还是正式废弃。

## 后置优化待办
- `fast` / `standard` / `full` 执行档位
- 自然语言到结构化执行选项映射
- “只剪辑、不加字幕、不加封面”等用户控制能力
- 封面标题生成策略细化
- 更细粒度的性能指标与批处理优化

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace

from apps.api.main import create_app
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace="clonecut_api_integration:",
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 2,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1, 1, 1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "download_timeout_seconds": 30,
                "download_chunk_size": 4096,
                "use_internal_pipeline": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
            },
        },
    )


def test_api_task_lifecycle_list_and_cancel(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_lifecycle.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    source = tmp_path / "task-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")

    created = client.post(
        "/api/tasks",
        json={
            "task_type": "video",
            "source_url": str(source),
            "metadata": {"source": "api-test"},
        },
    )
    assert created.status_code == 201
    created_payload = created.get_json() or {}
    task_id = str(created_payload.get("task_id", "")).strip()
    assert task_id

    listed = client.get("/api/tasks", query_string={"status": "pending", "limit": 20, "offset": 0})
    assert listed.status_code == 200
    listed_payload = listed.get_json() or {}
    assert listed_payload.get("success") is True
    tasks = listed_payload.get("tasks") or []
    assert any(str(item.get("task_id")) == task_id for item in tasks)

    cancelled = client.post(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/cancel")
    assert cancelled.status_code == 200
    cancelled_payload = cancelled.get_json() or {}
    assert cancelled_payload.get("success") is True

    detail = client.get(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    assert detail_payload.get("success") is True
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("status") == TaskStatus.CANCELLED.value

    queue_status = client.get("/api/queues")
    assert queue_status.status_code == 200
    queue_payload = queue_status.get_json() or {}
    counts = queue_payload.get("task_status_counts") or {}
    assert int(counts.get(TaskStatus.CANCELLED.value, 0)) >= 1


def test_api_retry_failed_task(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_retry.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    source = tmp_path / "failed-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")
    failed = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="failed-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="api-test",
        source_path=str(source),
        status=TaskStatus.FAILED,
        metadata={
            "source": "api-test",
            "failed_from_status": TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value,
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(failed)

    retried = client.post("/api/tasks/failed-1/retry")
    assert retried.status_code == 200
    retried_payload = retried.get_json() or {}
    assert retried_payload.get("success") is True

    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/failed-1")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("status") == TaskStatus.PENDING.value
    metadata = task_payload.get("metadata") or {}
    assert metadata.get("manual_retry") is True

    queue_status = client.get("/api/queues")
    assert queue_status.status_code == 200
    queue_payload = queue_status.get_json() or {}
    queue_sizes = queue_payload.get("queue_sizes") or {}
    assert int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0)) >= 1


def test_api_tasks_invalid_status_filter_returns_400(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_invalid_status.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    response = client.get("/api/tasks", query_string={"status": "not-a-status"})
    assert response.status_code == 400
    payload = response.get_json() or {}
    assert payload.get("success") is False


def test_api_task_artifacts_list_and_download(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_artifacts.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "artifact-task-1"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_video = task_dir / "artifact-task-1_final.mp4"
    final_video.write_bytes(b"video")
    subtitle_srt = task_dir / "total.srt"
    subtitle_srt.write_text("1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nhello\n", encoding="utf-8")
    clip_text = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
    clip_text.write_text("鍓緫鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    forum_post_info = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
    forum_post_info.write_text('{"thread_id":"123"}', encoding="utf-8")
    cover_image = task_dir / "artifact-cover.png"
    cover_image.write_bytes(b"png")
    logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (logs_dir / "funclip_20260326_150000.log").write_text("ok", encoding="utf-8")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="artifact-task-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="api-test",
        status=TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
        output_path=str(final_video),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source")
    task.result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("artifacts_url") == "/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts"
    assert task_payload.get("openclaw_result_url") == "/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/openclaw-result"
    assert task_payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    result = task_payload.get("result") or {}
    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
    assert artifacts
    subtitle_artifact = next(item for item in artifacts if item.get("role") == "subtitle_srt")
    clip_text_artifact = next(item for item in artifacts if item.get("role") == "clip_text")
    assert subtitle_artifact.get("download_url") == (
        f"/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts/{subtitle_artifact.get('artifact_id')}/download"
    )
    assert task_payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("outputs", {}).get("clip_text", {}).get("artifact_id") == (
        clip_text_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    )

    listed = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts")
    assert listed.status_code == 200
    listed_payload = listed.get_json() or {}
    listed_artifacts = listed_payload.get("artifacts") or []
    assert any(item.get("role") == "cover_image" for item in listed_artifacts)
    assert listed_payload.get("render_manifest", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"

    subtitle_download = client.get(subtitle_artifact.get("download_url"))
    assert subtitle_download.status_code == 200
    assert b"hello" in subtitle_download.data

    openclaw_result_resp = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/openclaw-result")
    assert openclaw_result_resp.status_code == 200
    openclaw_result_payload = openclaw_result_resp.get_json() or {}
    openclaw_result = openclaw_result_payload.get("openclaw_result") or {}
    assert openclaw_result.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    outputs = openclaw_result.get("outputs") or {}
    assert outputs.get("final_video", {}).get("filename") == "artifact-task-1_final.mp4"
    assert outputs.get("subtitle_srt", {}).get("artifact_id") == subtitle_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    assert outputs.get("clip_text", {}).get("artifact_id") == clip_text_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    assert outputs.get("forum_post_info", {}).get("filename") == "forum_post_info.json"
    assert outputs.get("processing_log", {}).get("filename") == "funclip_20260326_150000.log"
Tool Result #932 shell_command call_ywFPcGpwbhAVjQiLUJaGcCb4 exit 0 05:08:57
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations from pathlib import Path import pytest from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_tas...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task, submit_openclaw_video_task, wait_for_openclaw_result


class _FakeResponse:
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
        self.status_code = status_code
        self._payload = payload
        self.text = str(payload)

    def json(self):
        return self._payload


class _FakeSession:
    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
        self.post_calls = []
        self.get_calls = []

    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.post_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
        return self.post_responses.pop(0)

    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.get_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
        return self.get_responses.pop(0)


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/openclaw-result",
                },
            )
        ]
    )

    payload = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        api_token="token-1",
        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
    call = session.post_calls[0]
    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/upload-video"
    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"


def test_wait_for_openclaw_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    session = _FakeSession(
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "processing"},
                },
            ),
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {
                        "schema_version": "1.0",
                        "status": "completed",
                        "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}},
                    },
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = wait_for_openclaw_result(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        task_id="task-123",
        poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
    assert len(session.get_calls) == 2


def test_run_openclaw_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                },
            )
        ],
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                    "openclaw_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "completed"},
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = run_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        wait=True,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("submit", {}).get("task_id") == "task-789"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("openclaw_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
    missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        submit_openclaw_video_task(
            api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
            video_path=missing,
        )

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md @@ ### 3.2 通用入口层 这是把核心能力暴露给外部系统的统一入口。 推荐保留两类： - HTTP API - CLI 命令入口 这...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md
@@
 ### 3.2 通用入口层
 
 这是把核心能力暴露给外部系统的统一入口。
 
 推荐保留两类：
 
 - HTTP API
 - CLI 命令入口
 
 这样做的目的，是让外部平台不需要理解内部 Python 模块结构，只需要调用一个稳定入口。
+
+这里需要进一步固定一条口径：
+
+- CloneCut 只维护一套平台中立的 canonical API / CLI
+- canonical 命名不携带 `openclaw_*` 前缀，不把某个平台名字写进内核边界
+- OpenClaw、Codex、MCP、shell wrapper 都通过这套 canonical 入口接入
+- 不新增长期兼容层；仓库内现有 OpenClaw 调用点在通用入口落地时同步迁移
@@
 ### 6.1 API / CLI 通用入口层
 
 负责：
 
 - 接收视频上传
@@
 - 暴露统一结果对象
 - 作为 skill/tool 的稳定调用入口
 
 不负责：
 
 - 拼装具体 stage 调用顺序
 - 处理旧脚本参数
+
+推荐 canonical 入口最小收敛为：
+
+- `POST /api/tasks/video`：multipart 上传视频并创建标准任务
+- `POST /api/tasks`：JSON 任务创建接口，继续承载通用任务协议
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>`：任务详情
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`：平台中立标准结果对象 `task_result`
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts` / `download`：产物与下载接口
+
+对应 canonical CLI：
+
+- `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+- `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+
+这里的结果对象命名也应收敛为：
+
+- `task_result`
+- 而不是 `openclaw_result`
@@
 ### 阶段5：建立通用入口与结果契约
 
 目标：让 CloneCut 可以被任何外部平台通过统一入口调用，而不是只为 OpenClaw 服务。
 
 包含：
 
 - 稳定 HTTP API
 - 稳定 CLI 命令
 - 结果 schema_version
 - 结果契约测试
+
+明确执行口径：
+
+- 本阶段直接落 canonical API / CLI
+- 本阶段同步迁移仓库内已有 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点
+- 不保留长期 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 命名作为系统核心边界
+- OpenClaw 只作为适配层存在，不再定义 CloneCut 的标准调用协议
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\方案B执行待办清单.md
@@
 ## 当前事实基线
@@
 - 当前测试已锁定的 `strict_rejected`、`timeline_fallback`、`copy_fallback`、`rule_based` 等行为，在等价替代契约落地前仍需保留为显式运行时保护
 - OpenClaw 不是唯一目标平台；需要建立平台无关的 API/CLI 通用入口，再由 skill/tool 层调用
+- 第三项通用入口已固定执行口径：直接落 canonical API/CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点，不新增长期兼容层
@@
 ## Phase 5：建立平台无关通用入口
@@
 执行要求：
 
-- [ ] 提供稳定 HTTP API 供外部平台调用
-- [ ] 提供稳定 CLI 命令供 shell skill / wrapper 调用
+- [ ] 提供稳定 canonical HTTP API 供外部平台调用
+- [ ] 提供稳定 canonical CLI 命令供 shell skill / wrapper 调用
 - [ ] 外部平台不需要直接依赖内部 Python 模块结构
-- [ ] `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest` 明确 `schema_version`
+- [ ] `task_result` / `render_manifest` 明确 `schema_version`
 - [ ] 结果必填字段和 artifacts 命名规则固化
+- [ ] canonical 视频上传路由固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`
+- [ ] canonical 结果读取路由固定为 `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [ ] canonical Python 客户端固定为 `apps/api/task_client.py`
+- [ ] canonical CLI 固定为 `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+- [ ] 仓库内 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点在本阶段同步迁移
+- [ ] 不保留长期 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 命名兼容层
 
 验收：
 
 - [ ] 不同调用方可以通过同一入口提交任务并读取结果
 - [ ] 结果 schema 的破坏性变更可以被契约测试拦住
@@
 ## Phase 6：Skill / Wrapper 适配层
@@
 执行要求：
 
 - [ ] OpenClaw skill 改为只调用通用 API/CLI
 - [ ] 保留 shell wrapper 作为通用 skill 载体
 - [ ] 预留 MCP / 其他 agent skill 的接入说明
 - [ ] skill 不直接依赖内部 stage 文件名、内部目录结构
+- [ ] skill / wrapper 不再直接消费 `openclaw_result`，统一消费 `task_result`
*** End Patch

@@
 ## 当前阶段结论
 - 方案B已确定为当前执行路线：以 `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` 作为唯一生产主链，禁止旧架构级兜底，禁止长期双轨运行。
 - 当前阻塞点不是 OpenClaw 接口层，而是内置视频流水线本体未完成：`domain/video/pipeline.py` 依赖的 `domain/video/stages/` 缺失。
 - 上一阶段成果已独立提交并推送：`9a0d91a feat: add warm internal pipeline runner`。
 - Redis 继续采用宿主机服务化方式，不以 Docker 部署为未来前提。
 - 当前测试已锁定的 `strict_rejected`、`timeline_fallback`、`copy_fallback`、`rule_based` 等行为，在等价替代契约落地前继续按正式运行时保护处理，不视为旧架构兜底。
 - OpenClaw 只是第一层 skill 适配平台，不是系统唯一宿主；方案B新增明确三层结构：平台无关核心能力层、API/CLI 通用入口层、Skill/Wrapper 适配层。
+- 平台无关入口阶段已固定口径：直接落 canonical API/CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点，不保留长期 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 兼容层。
@@
 ## 当前进行中
-- 方案B Phase 0：冻结边界与执行口径，文档化“单一路径、禁止旧架构级兜底、保留明确报错保护、worker 内常驻预热”的新设计。
-- 方案B Phase 1 准备启动：按测试和 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 的目标接口重建 `domain/video/stages/`，并先补最小可运行骨架；后续在主链收敛后建立平台无关 API/CLI 和多平台 skill 适配层。
+- 方案B Phase 4 已完成并通过稳定性验收：worker 常驻资源治理、ready gate、失败后重建与并发治理已落地；`test.mp4` 顺序 3 次、并发 2 次验收通过。
+- 当前进入 方案B Phase 5：建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，把标准结果对象收敛为 `task_result`，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点。
@@
 ## 已完成
@@
 - 已验证 warm runner 能显著减少“每任务重新起解释器”的额外开销，但该方案仅作为上一阶段试验结果保留，不进入方案B主设计。
 - 已重建 `.venv-p310` 运行环境，并修复旧 `pre` 内置流水线在新环境下的两个关键运行时问题：子进程输出编码导致的 warm runner 失败，以及 `ffmpeg` 隐式路径依赖导致的 step6 中断；`test.mp4` 已于 2026-03-27 通过 OpenClaw -> CloneCut -> 回传链路再次验证，结果为 `executed_mode=real_pipeline`。
+- 已完成 worker 常驻资源治理稳定性收口：新增 runtime 预热、ready gate、失败后失效重建、停止时 readiness 清理，并于 2026-03-29 用 `test.mp4` 完成顺序 3 次 + 并发 2 次验收，结果稳定为 `executed_mode=video_pipeline`。
@@
 ## 待完成
@@
 - 修改 `apps/worker/service.py`，让通用视频任务主路径直接调用 `VideoPipeline`。
-- 建立平台无关 API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
-- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用通用入口，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
+- 建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
+- 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为平台中立的 `task_result`，并补齐 schema/契约测试。
+- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用 canonical API/CLI，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
 - 用 OpenClaw 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
 - 清理旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 在 worker 主路径上的运行时依赖，并单独决策 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是迁移期兼容还是正式废弃。
*** End Patch

*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\superpowers\specs\2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry-design.md
+# CloneCut Platform-Neutral Entry Design
+
+> 已确认方向：CloneCut 的长期边界应为平台中立的 canonical API / CLI；OpenClaw 只是外层适配器，不再定义系统核心协议。
+
+## Goal
+
+把当前带有 OpenClaw 命名痕迹的外部入口，收敛为 CloneCut 自己的标准入口，让任何支持 `skill / tool / shell / HTTP / MCP` 的平台都能通过同一套协议调用 CloneCut。
+
+## Scope
+
+本轮只做入口层和协议层收敛，不改 worker / pipeline 的主业务逻辑，不引入新的兼容执行路径。
+
+包含：
+
+- 平台中立 canonical HTTP API
+- 平台中立 canonical Python client
+- 平台中立 canonical CLI / PowerShell wrapper
+- 任务标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为 `task_result`
+- 仓库内已有 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点同步迁移
+- 文档、TODO、契约测试同步更新
+
+不包含：
+
+- 新的功能档位设计
+- 多轮自然语言结构化控制
+- 重新设计 `render_manifest`
+- worker / pipeline 执行链重构
+
+## Canonical Boundary
+
+CloneCut 的入口层固定为：
+
+- `POST /api/tasks`：通用 JSON 任务创建
+- `POST /api/tasks/video`：multipart 视频上传并建任务
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>`：任务详情
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`：平台中立 `task_result`
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts`：产物清单
+- `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/download` 与 artifact download：产物下载
+
+CloneCut 的通用调用端固定为：
+
+- `apps/api/task_client.py`
+- `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+- `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+
+## Result Contract
+
+标准结果对象命名为 `task_result`，继续复用当前已稳定的结构字段：
+
+- `schema_version`
+- `task_id`
+- `status`
+- `is_ready`
+- `executed_mode`
+- `status_url`
+- `download_url`
+- `artifacts_url`
+- `progress`
+- `outputs`
+- `manifest`
+
+也就是说，这一轮主要改的是“边界命名”和“平台归属”，不是另起一套结果结构。
+
+## Migration Rule
+
+这轮不保留长期兼容层。
+
+具体口径：
+
+- canonical API / CLI 一次到位
+- 仓库内已有 OpenClaw 调用点同步迁移到 canonical 入口
+- OpenClaw skill 继续保留为适配层，但它调用的是 canonical API / CLI
+- 不再继续扩散 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 这类平台专属命名
+
+## Testing
+
+需要补齐三类验证：
+
+- API 集成测试：详情页、结果页、上传页都切到 canonical 命名
+- Python client 单元测试：提交、轮询、结果读取都走 canonical 路由
+- 一次真实 API/CLI 验证：用 `test.mp4` 跑通上传到结果读取
+
+## Expected Outcome
+
+完成后，CloneCut 的外部边界将变成：
+
+平台侧适配器 -> canonical API / CLI -> WorkerService -> VideoPipeline -> stages
+
+这样后续新增 Codex skill、MCP tool、shell wrapper 时，不再需要继续围绕 OpenClaw 协议打转。
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\superpowers\plans\2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry.md
+# Platform-Neutral Entry Implementation Plan
+
+> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
+
+**Goal:** 将 CloneCut 外部入口收敛为平台中立 canonical API / CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点。
+
+**Architecture:** 继续复用现有 `/api/tasks` 资源模型，在其上增加 canonical 视频上传与 canonical 结果读取；以 `task_result` 取代 `openclaw_result` 作为标准返回对象，并用平台中立 Python client / CLI 承载外部调用。
+
+**Tech Stack:** Flask, Python argparse, PowerShell wrapper, existing WorkerService task/result schema
+
+---
+
+### Task 1: 更新文档与活动待办
+
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `docs/方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md`
+- Modify: `docs/方案B执行待办清单.md`
+- Modify: `Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v3.md`
+- Create: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry-design.md`
+
+- [ ] 记录 canonical API / CLI 方案与“不保留长期兼容层”的执行口径
+- [ ] 将当前进行中切换到 Phase 5：canonical entry
+
+### Task 2: 先写 canonical API / client 失败测试
+
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
+- Replace: `tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` -> `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`
+
+- [ ] 先让 API 测试要求 `result_url` / `task_result` / `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [ ] 先让 client 测试要求 `/api/tasks/video` 和 `task_result`
+- [ ] 运行定向测试，确认当前实现失败
+
+### Task 3: 实现 canonical API
+
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `apps/api/main.py`
+
+- [ ] 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为 `task_result`
+- [ ] 将 canonical 结果路由固定为 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [ ] 将 canonical 视频上传路由固定为 `/api/tasks/video`
+- [ ] 任务详情返回 `result_url` 与 `task_result`
+
+### Task 4: 实现 canonical Python client / CLI
+
+**Files:**
+- Create: `apps/api/task_client.py`
+- Create: `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+- Create: `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+
+- [ ] 提供提交、轮询、读取结果的统一 client
+- [ ] CLI 只做薄包装，不再带 OpenClaw 命名
+
+### Task 5: 迁移仓库内适配层调用点
+
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/SKILL.md`
+- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/run_clonecut_task.mjs`
+
+- [ ] skill 适配层切到 canonical API / CLI
+- [ ] skill 文档改为消费 `task_result`
+
+### Task 6: 验证
+
+**Files:**
+- Verify only
+
+- [ ] 跑 API / client 相关测试
+- [ ] 跑一次真实 `test.mp4` API/CLI 验证
+- [ ] 记录结论与剩余风险
*** End Patch

@@
 def test_api_task_artifacts_list_and_download(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
@@
     assert outputs.get("clip_text", {}).get("artifact_id") == clip_text_artifact.get("artifact_id")
     assert outputs.get("forum_post_info", {}).get("filename") == "forum_post_info.json"
     assert outputs.get("processing_log", {}).get("filename") == "funclip_20260326_150000.log"
+
+
+def test_api_task_detail_exposes_platform_neutral_task_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_task_result.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+    app = create_app(service)
+    client = app.test_client()
+
+    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "task-result-1"
+    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    final_video = task_dir / "task-result-1_final.mp4"
+    final_video.write_bytes(b"video")
+
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="task-result-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="api-test",
+        status=TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
+        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
+        output_path=str(final_video),
+    )
+    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source")
+    task.result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
+        task,
+        {
+            "success": True,
+            "request_type": "video",
+            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
+            "output_path": str(final_video),
+        },
+    )
+    service._persist_task(task)
+
+    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/task-result-1")
+    assert detail.status_code == 200
+    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
+    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
+    assert task_payload.get("result_url") == "/api/tasks/task-result-1/result"
+    assert task_payload.get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
+
+    result_resp = client.get("/api/tasks/task-result-1/result")
+    assert result_resp.status_code == 200
+    result_payload = result_resp.get_json() or {}
+    task_result = result_payload.get("task_result") or {}
+    assert task_result.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
+    assert task_result.get("outputs", {}).get("final_video", {}).get("filename") == "task-result-1_final.mp4"
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\tests\unit\test_task_client.py
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from pathlib import Path
+
+import pytest
+
+from apps.api.task_client import run_video_task, submit_video_task, wait_for_task_result
+
+
+class _FakeResponse:
+    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
+        self.status_code = status_code
+        self._payload = payload
+        self.text = str(payload)
+
+    def json(self):
+        return self._payload
+
+
+class _FakeSession:
+    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
+        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
+        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
+        self.post_calls = []
+        self.get_calls = []
+
+    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
+        if not self.post_responses:
+            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
+        return self.post_responses.pop(0)
+
+    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
+        if not self.get_responses:
+            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
+        return self.get_responses.pop(0)
+
+
+def test_submit_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
+    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
+    video.write_bytes(b"video")
+    session = _FakeSession(
+        post_responses=[
+            _FakeResponse(
+                201,
+                {
+                    "success": True,
+                    "task_id": "task-123",
+                    "result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/result",
+                },
+            )
+        ]
+    )
+
+    payload = submit_video_task(
+        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
+        video_path=video,
+        api_token="token-1",
+        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
+        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
+        session=session,
+    )
+
+    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
+    call = session.post_calls[0]
+    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/video"
+    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
+    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
+    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
+    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
+    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
+    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"
+
+
+def test_wait_for_task_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    session = _FakeSession(
+        get_responses=[
+            _FakeResponse(
+                200,
+                {
+                    "success": True,
+                    "task_id": "task-123",
+                    "task_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "processing"},
+                },
+            ),
+            _FakeResponse(
+                200,
+                {
+                    "success": True,
+                    "task_id": "task-123",
+                    "task_result": {
+                        "schema_version": "1.0",
+                        "status": "completed",
+                        "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}},
+                    },
+                },
+            ),
+        ]
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.task_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)
+
+    payload = wait_for_task_result(
+        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
+        task_id="task-123",
+        poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
+        session=session,
+    )
+
+    assert payload.get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
+    assert payload.get("task_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
+    assert len(session.get_calls) == 2
+
+
+def test_run_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
+    video.write_bytes(b"video")
+    session = _FakeSession(
+        post_responses=[
+            _FakeResponse(
+                201,
+                {
+                    "success": True,
+                    "task_id": "task-789",
+                },
+            )
+        ],
+        get_responses=[
+            _FakeResponse(
+                200,
+                {
+                    "success": True,
+                    "task_id": "task-789",
+                    "task_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "completed"},
+                },
+            ),
+        ]
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.task_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)
+
+    payload = run_video_task(
+        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
+        video_path=video,
+        wait=True,
+        session=session,
+    )
+
+    assert payload.get("submit", {}).get("task_id") == "task-789"
+    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
+    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("task_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
+
+
+def test_submit_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
+    missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
+    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
+        submit_video_task(
+            api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
+            video_path=missing,
+        )
*** End Patch

  147:         return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts"

  154: 
  155:     def _find_task_artifact(task: dict[str, Any], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  156:         result = task.get("result") if isinstance(task.get("result"), dict) else {}
  157:         artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
  158:         target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
  159:         if not target:
  160:             return None
  161:         for artifact in artifacts:
  162:             if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
  163:                 continue
  164:             if str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip() == target:
  165:                 return artifact
  166:         return None
  167: 
  168:     def _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id: dict[str, dict[str, Any]], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  169:         target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
  170:         if not target:
  171:             return None
  172:         artifact = artifacts_by_id.get(target)
  173:         if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
  174:             return None
  175:         return {
  176:             "artifact_id": target,
  177:             "role": artifact.get("role"),
  178:             "kind": artifact.get("kind"),
  179:             "filename": artifact.get("filename"),
  180:             "path": artifact.get("path"),
  181:             "relative_path": artifact.get("relative_path"),
  182:             "download_url": artifact.get("download_url"),
  183:             "is_primary": bool(artifact.get("is_primary")),
  184:         }
  185: 
  186:     def _compact_json_like(value: Any) -> Any:
  187:         if isinstance(value, dict):
  188:             compacted: dict[str, Any] = {}
  189:             for key, item in value.items():
  190:                 normalized = _compact_json_like(item)
  191:                 if normalized in (None, "", [], {}):
  192:                     continue
  193:                 compacted[str(key)] = normalized
  194:             return compacted
  195:         if isinstance(value, list):
  196:             compacted_list = [_compact_json_like(item) for item in value]
  197:             return [item for item in compacted_list if item not in (None, "", [], {})]
  198:         return value
  199: 
  200:     def _build_openclaw_result(task: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
  201:         decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_openclaw_result=False)
  202:         task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
  203:         result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
  204:         render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
  205:         artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
  206:         artifacts_by_id = {
  207:             str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip(): item
  208:             for item in artifacts
  209:             if isinstance(item, dict) and str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
  210:         }
  211:         videos = render_manifest.get("videos") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("videos"), dict) else {}
  212:         subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("subtitles"), dict) else {}
  213:         texts = render_manifest.get("texts") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("texts"), dict) else {}
  214:         context = render_manifest.get("context") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("context"), dict) else {}
  215:         cover = render_manifest.get("cover") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("cover"), dict) else {}
  216:         logs = render_manifest.get("logs") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("logs"), dict) else {}
  217:         pipeline_state = (
  218:             render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("pipeline_state"), dict) else {}
  219:         )
  220: 
  221:         openclaw_result = {
  222:             "schema_version": RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION,
  223:             "task_id": task_id,
  224:             "status": decorated.get("status"),
  225:             "is_ready": str(decorated.get("status") or "").strip().lower() == "completed",
  226:             "executed_mode": result.get("executed_mode"),
  227:             "status_url": decorated.get("status_url"),
  228:             "download_url": decorated.get("download_url"),
  229:             "artifacts_url": decorated.get("artifacts_url"),
  230:             "progress": {
  231:                 "current_stage": decorated.get("current_stage"),
  232:                 "stage_checkpoint": decorated.get("stage_checkpoint"),
  233:                 "last_completed_step": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step"),
  234:                 "last_completed_step_name": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step_name"),
  235:             },
  236:             "outputs": {
  237:                 "final_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("primary") or "")),
  238:                 "subtitled_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("subtitled") or "")),
  239:                 "no_subtitle_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("no_subtitle") or "")),
  240:                 "coverless_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("coverless") or "")),
  241:                 "alternate_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("alternate") or "")),
  242:                 "subtitle_srt": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("srt") or "")),
  243:                 "subtitle_ass": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("ass") or "")),
  244:                 "script_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(
  245:                     artifacts_by_id,
  246:                     str(texts.get("script") or subtitles.get("script") or ""),
  247:                 ),
  248:                 "clip_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(texts.get("clip_text") or "")),
  249:                 "cover_image": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(cover.get("image") or "")),
  250:                 "forum_post_info": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(context.get("forum_post_info") or "")),
  251:                 "processing_log": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(logs.get("processing") or "")),
  252:             },
  253:             "manifest": {
  254:                 "primary_artifact_id": render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id"),
  255:                 "primary_download_url": render_manifest.get("primary_download_url"),
  256:                 "artifact_count": render_manifest.get("artifact_count"),
  257:             },
  258:         }
  259:         return _compact_json_like(openclaw_result)
  260: 
  261:     def _decorate_task_for_api(task: dict[str, Any], include_openclaw_result: bool = False) -> dict[str, Any]:
  262:         decorated = copy.deepcopy(task)
  263:         task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
  264:         if not task_id:
  265:             return decorated
  266: 
  267:         decorated["status_url"] = _build_status_url(task_id)
  268:         decorated["download_url"] = _build_download_url(task_id)
  269:         decorated["artifacts_url"] = _build_artifacts_url(task_id)
  270:         decorated["openclaw_result_url"] = _build_openclaw_result_url(task_id)
  271: 
  272:         result = decorated.get("result")
  273:         if not isinstance(result, dict):
  274:             if include_openclaw_result:
  275:                 decorated["openclaw_result"] = _build_openclaw_result(decorated)
  276:             return decorated
  277: 
  278:         artifacts = result.get("artifacts")
  279:         if isinstance(artifacts, list):
  280:             for artifact in artifacts:
  281:                 if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
  282:                     continue
  283:                 artifact_id = str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
  284:                 if artifact_id:
  285:                     artifact["download_url"] = _build_artifact_download_url(task_id, artifact_id)
  286: 
  287:         render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest")
  288:         if isinstance(render_manifest, dict):
  289:             primary_artifact_id = str(render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id") or "").strip()
  290:             if primary_artifact_id:
  291:                 render_manifest["primary_download_url"] = _build_artifact_download_url(task_id, primary_artifact_id)
  292:         if include_openclaw_result:
  293:             decorated["openclaw_result"] = _build_openclaw_result(decorated)
  294:         return decorated
  295: 
  296:     def _save_uploaded_video(task_id: str) -> tuple[Path, str, int]:
  297:         uploaded = request.files.get("file")
  298:         if uploaded is None:
  299:             raise ValueError("missing file field")
  300:         filename = secure_filename(str(uploaded.filename or "").strip()) or "video.mp4"
  301:         suffix = Path(filename).suffix.lower()
  302:         content_type = str(uploaded.content_type or "").strip().lower()
  303:         allowed_suffixes = {".mp4", ".mov", ".mkv", ".avi", ".m4v", ".webm"}
  304:         if suffix and suffix not in allowed_suffixes and not content_type.startswith("video/"):
  305:             raise ValueError(f"unsupported video file type: {suffix or content_type or 'unknown'}")
  306: 
  307:         task_dir = _api_upload_root / task_id
  308:         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  309:         target = task_dir / filename
  310:         uploaded.save(str(target))
--- 480-575 ---
  480:     @app.post("/api/tasks")
  481:     @_require_token
  482:     def create_task() -> Any:
  483:         data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
  484:         ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
  485:         if not ok:
  486:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
  487:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201
  488: 
  489:     @app.post("/api/tasks/upload")
  490:     @app.post("/api/tasks/upload-video")
  491:     @_require_token
  492:     def upload_video_task() -> Any:
  493:         requested_task_id = str(request.form.get("task_id", "") or "").strip()
  494:         task_id = requested_task_id or str(uuid.uuid4())
  495:         stored_path: Path | None = None
  496:         stored_dir: Path | None = None
  497:         try:
  498:             stored_path, filename, size_bytes = _save_uploaded_video(task_id=task_id)
  499:             stored_dir = stored_path.parent
  500:             submit_payload = _build_upload_task_payload(
  501:                 task_id=task_id,
  502:                 source_path=stored_path,
  503:                 original_filename=filename,
  504:             )
  505:             ok, resolved_task_id, error = service.submit(submit_payload)
  506:             if not ok:
  507:                 raise ValueError(error or "invalid task payload")
  508:         except ValueError as exc:
  509:             if stored_dir is not None and stored_dir.exists():
  510:                 shutil.rmtree(stored_dir, ignore_errors=True)
  511:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
  512:         except Exception as exc:
  513:             if stored_dir is not None and stored_dir.exists():
  514:                 shutil.rmtree(stored_dir, ignore_errors=True)
  515:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": f"upload task failed: {exc}"}), 500
  516: 
  517:         return (
  518:             jsonify(
  519:                 {
  520:                     "success": True,
  521:                     "task_id": resolved_task_id,
  522:                     "filename": filename,
  523:                     "stored_path": str(stored_path),
  524:                     "file_size_bytes": size_bytes,
  525:                     "status_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}",
  526:                     "download_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/download",
  527:                     "artifacts_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/artifacts",
  528:                     "openclaw_result_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/openclaw-result",
  529:                 }
  530:             ),
  531:             201,
  532:         )
  533: 
  534:     @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>")
  535:     def task_detail(task_id: str) -> Any:
  536:         task = service.get_task(task_id)
  537:         if task is None:
  538:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
  539:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task": _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_openclaw_result=True)})
  540: 
  541:     @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts")
  542:     def task_artifacts(task_id: str) -> Any:

Tool Call #998 apply_patch call_1dKdwBIjAaeEvqy8UCDqPwoK 05:16:34
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\apps\api\task_client.py +from __future__ import annotations + +import json +import mimetypes +from pathlib im...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\apps\api\task_client.py
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import json
+import mimetypes
+from pathlib import Path
+import time
+from typing import Any, Mapping
+
+import requests
+
+
+def _normalize_api_base(api_base: str) -> str:
+    text = str(api_base or "").strip().rstrip("/")
+    if not text:
+        raise ValueError("api_base is required")
+    return text
+
+
+def _resolve_api_url(api_base: str, path: str) -> str:
+    base = _normalize_api_base(api_base)
+    suffix = str(path or "").strip()
+    if not suffix:
+        return base
+    if not suffix.startswith("/"):
+        suffix = "/" + suffix
+    return base + suffix
+
+
+def _build_auth_headers(api_token: str) -> dict[str, str]:
+    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
+    if not token:
+        return {}
+    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}
+
+
+def _response_json(response: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    try:
+        payload = response.json()
+    except Exception as exc:
+        status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
+        text = str(getattr(response, "text", "") or "").strip()
+        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned non-json response: status={status_code} body={text}") from exc
+    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
+        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned invalid payload type: {type(payload)!r}")
+    return payload
+
+
+def _ensure_success_payload(payload: Mapping[str, Any], response: Any, context: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    body = dict(payload or {})
+    if bool(body.get("success")):
+        return body
+    status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
+    error = str(body.get("error") or "").strip() or f"{context} failed"
+    raise RuntimeError(f"{context} failed: status={status_code} error={error}")
+
+
+def _coerce_form_value(value: Any) -> str:
+    if isinstance(value, (dict, list)):
+        return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False)
+    if value is None:
+        return ""
+    return str(value)
+
+
+def submit_video_task(
+    api_base: str,
+    video_path: str | Path,
+    *,
+    api_token: str = "",
+    task_id: str = "",
+    source: str = "clonecut_task_client",
+    stage5_model_name: str = "",
+    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
+    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
+    session: Any = None,
+) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    client = session or requests
+    file_path = Path(video_path).expanduser()
+    if not file_path.exists() or not file_path.is_file():
+        raise FileNotFoundError(f"video file not found: {file_path}")
+
+    form: dict[str, str] = {"source": source}
+    if task_id:
+        form["task_id"] = str(task_id).strip()
+    if stage5_model_name:
+        form["stage5_model_name"] = str(stage5_model_name).strip()
+    for key, value in dict(extra_form or {}).items():
+        text = _coerce_form_value(value)
+        if text:
+            form[str(key)] = text
+
+    content_type = mimetypes.guess_type(file_path.name)[0] or "application/octet-stream"
+    with file_path.open("rb") as file_handle:
+        response = client.post(
+            _resolve_api_url(api_base, "/api/tasks/video"),
+            data=form,
+            files={"file": (file_path.name, file_handle, content_type)},
+            headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
+            timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
+        )
+    payload = _response_json(response)
+    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="submit video task")
+
+
+def fetch_task_result(
+    api_base: str,
+    task_id: str,
+    *,
+    api_token: str = "",
+    timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
+    session: Any = None,
+) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    client = session or requests
+    resolved_task_id = str(task_id or "").strip()
+    if not resolved_task_id:
+        raise ValueError("task_id is required")
+
+    response = client.get(
+        _resolve_api_url(api_base, f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/result"),
+        headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
+        timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
+    )
+    payload = _response_json(response)
+    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="fetch task result")
+
+
+def wait_for_task_result(
+    api_base: str,
+    task_id: str,
+    *,
+    api_token: str = "",
+    timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
+    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
+    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
+    session: Any = None,
+) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    deadline = time.time() + max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds))
+    while True:
+        payload = fetch_task_result(
+            api_base=api_base,
+            task_id=task_id,
+            api_token=api_token,
+            timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
+            session=session,
+        )
+        result = payload.get("task_result") if isinstance(payload.get("task_result"), dict) else {}
+        status = str(result.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
+        if status in {"completed", "failed", "cancelled"}:
+            return payload
+        if time.time() >= deadline:
+            raise TimeoutError(f"wait task result timed out: task_id={task_id} status={status or 'unknown'}")
+        time.sleep(max(0.2, float(poll_interval_seconds)))
+
+
+def run_video_task(
+    api_base: str,
+    video_path: str | Path,
+    *,
+    api_token: str = "",
+    task_id: str = "",
+    source: str = "clonecut_task_client",
+    stage5_model_name: str = "",
+    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
+    wait: bool = True,
+    submit_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
+    wait_timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
+    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
+    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
+    session: Any = None,
+) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    submitted = submit_video_task(
+        api_base=api_base,
+        video_path=video_path,
+        api_token=api_token,
+        task_id=task_id,
+        source=source,
+        stage5_model_name=stage5_model_name,
+        extra_form=extra_form,
+        timeout_seconds=submit_timeout_seconds,
+        session=session,
+    )
+    output = {"submit": submitted}
+    if not wait:
+        return output
+
+    resolved_task_id = str(submitted.get("task_id") or "").strip()
+    if not resolved_task_id:
+        raise RuntimeError("submit response missing task_id")
+    output["result"] = wait_for_task_result(
+        api_base=api_base,
+        task_id=resolved_task_id,
+        api_token=api_token,
+        timeout_seconds=wait_timeout_seconds,
+        poll_interval_seconds=poll_interval_seconds,
+        request_timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
+        session=session,
+    )
+    return output
+
+
+__all__ = [
+    "fetch_task_result",
+    "run_video_task",
+    "submit_video_task",
+    "wait_for_task_result",
+]
*** End Patch

Tool Call #1003 apply_patch call_Ktw0XnJSkloqNR2eq5a0LSKH 05:17:08
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\scripts\clonecut_task_client.py +from __future__ import annotations + +import argparse +import json +import o...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\scripts\clonecut_task_client.py
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import json
+import os
+from pathlib import Path
+from typing import Iterable
+
+from apps.api.task_client import run_video_task
+
+
+def _parse_args(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Submit CloneCut video task and fetch canonical task_result payload")
+    parser.add_argument("--api-base", default="http://127.0.0.1:18100", help="CloneCut API base URL")
+    parser.add_argument("--file", required=True, help="Local video path to upload")
+    parser.add_argument("--api-token", default="", help="CloneCut API token, optional")
+    parser.add_argument("--api-token-env", default="CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", help="fallback env name for api token")
+    parser.add_argument("--task-id", default="", help="optional explicit task id")
+    parser.add_argument("--source", default="clonecut_task_client", help="task source marker")
+    parser.add_argument("--stage5-model-name", default="", help="stage5 model name or backend model id")
+    parser.add_argument("--clip-text", default="", help="optional explicit clip text override")
+    parser.add_argument("--post-url", default="", help="optional forum post url")
+    parser.add_argument("--no-wait", action="store_true", help="only submit task without polling result")
+    parser.add_argument("--submit-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=30.0, help="submit request timeout")
+    parser.add_argument("--wait-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=1800.0, help="poll total timeout")
+    parser.add_argument("--poll-interval-seconds", type=float, default=5.0, help="poll interval")
+    parser.add_argument("--request-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=15.0, help="single polling request timeout")
+    parser.add_argument("--output-json", default="", help="optional path to persist final json result")
+    return parser.parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)
+
+
+def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
+    args = _parse_args(argv)
+    api_token = str(args.api_token or "").strip() or str(os.getenv(args.api_token_env, "") or "").strip()
+
+    extra_form: dict[str, str] = {}
+    if args.clip_text:
+        extra_form["clip_text"] = str(args.clip_text)
+    if args.post_url:
+        extra_form["post_url"] = str(args.post_url)
+
+    payload = run_video_task(
+        api_base=args.api_base,
+        video_path=args.file,
+        api_token=api_token,
+        task_id=args.task_id,
+        source=args.source,
+        stage5_model_name=args.stage5_model_name,
+        extra_form=extra_form,
+        wait=not bool(args.no_wait),
+        submit_timeout_seconds=float(args.submit_timeout_seconds),
+        wait_timeout_seconds=float(args.wait_timeout_seconds),
+        poll_interval_seconds=float(args.poll_interval_seconds),
+        request_timeout_seconds=float(args.request_timeout_seconds),
+    )
+    text = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
+    print(text)
+
+    output_json = str(args.output_json or "").strip()
+    if output_json:
+        output_path = Path(output_json).expanduser()
+        output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        output_path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
+    return 0
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    raise SystemExit(main())
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\scripts\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1
+param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]
+    [string]$VideoPath,
+    [string]$ApiBase = "http://127.0.0.1:18100",
+    [string]$ApiToken = "",
+    [string]$TaskId = "",
+    [string]$Source = "clonecut_wrapper",
+    [string]$Stage5ModelName = "",
+    [string]$ClipText = "",
+    [string]$PostUrl = "",
+    [switch]$NoWait,
+    [string]$OutputJson = ""
+)
+
+$repoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$pythonBin = Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe"
+$clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\clonecut_task_client.py"
+
+if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $pythonBin)) {
+    throw "missing python: $pythonBin"
+}
+
+if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $clientScript)) {
+    throw "missing client script: $clientScript"
+}
+
+$args = @(
+    $clientScript,
+    "--api-base", $ApiBase,
+    "--file", $VideoPath,
+    "--source", $Source
+)
+
+if ($ApiToken) { $args += @("--api-token", $ApiToken) }
+if ($TaskId) { $args += @("--task-id", $TaskId) }
+if ($Stage5ModelName) { $args += @("--stage5-model-name", $Stage5ModelName) }
+if ($ClipText) { $args += @("--clip-text", $ClipText) }
+if ($PostUrl) { $args += @("--post-url", $PostUrl) }
+if ($NoWait) { $args += "--no-wait" }
+if ($OutputJson) { $args += @("--output-json", $OutputJson) }
+
+& $pythonBin @args
+exit $LASTEXITCODE
*** End Patch

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: param( [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)] [string]$File, [string]$ApiBase = "http://127.0.0.1:18100", [string]$ApiToken = "", [string]$Ta...

Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]
    [string]$File,

    [string]$ApiBase = "http://127.0.0.1:18100",
    [string]$ApiToken = "",
    [string]$TaskId = "",
    [string]$Source = "openclaw_skill",
    [string]$Stage5ModelName = "",
    [string]$ClipText = "",
    [string]$PostUrl = "",
    [switch]$NoWait,
    [double]$SubmitTimeoutSeconds = 30,
    [double]$WaitTimeoutSeconds = 1800,
    [double]$PollIntervalSeconds = 5,
    [double]$RequestTimeoutSeconds = 15,
    [string]$OutputJson = ""
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
$pythonCandidates = @(
    (Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe")
)
$pythonExe = $pythonCandidates | Where-Object { Test-Path -LiteralPath $_ } | Select-Object -First 1
$clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\\openclaw_task_client.py"

if (-not $pythonExe) {
    throw "missing python runtime: expected one of $($pythonCandidates -join ', ')"
}
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $clientScript)) {
    throw "missing client script: $clientScript"
}

$resolvedFile = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $File).Path
$args = @(
    $clientScript,
    "--api-base", $ApiBase,
    "--file", $resolvedFile,
    "--source", $Source,
    "--submit-timeout-seconds", [string]$SubmitTimeoutSeconds,
    "--wait-timeout-seconds", [string]$WaitTimeoutSeconds,
    "--poll-interval-seconds", [string]$PollIntervalSeconds,
    "--request-timeout-seconds", [string]$RequestTimeoutSeconds
)

if ($ApiToken) {
    $args += @("--api-token", $ApiToken)
}
if ($TaskId) {
    $args += @("--task-id", $TaskId)
}
if ($Stage5ModelName) {
    $args += @("--stage5-model-name", $Stage5ModelName)
}
if ($ClipText) {
    $args += @("--clip-text", $ClipText)
}
if ($PostUrl) {
    $args += @("--post-url", $PostUrl)
}
if ($NoWait) {
    $args += "--no-wait"
}
if ($OutputJson) {
    $args += @("--output-json", $OutputJson)
}

& $pythonExe @args
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    exit $LASTEXITCODE
}

Output:
---
name: clonecut_video_pipeline
description: Submit a local video into CloneCut's OpenClaw-integrated production pipeline and read back the normalized openclaw_result payload.
---

# CloneCut Video Pipeline

Use this skill when the user wants OpenClaw to process a local video through the
existing CloneCut production chain and return structured outputs such as final
video, subtitles, clip text, cover image, and task progress.

## Goal

Run the real CloneCut pipeline through the local API instead of manually
describing steps. Prefer the wrapper that matches the current runtime so the
caller does not need to remember upload endpoints, polling logic, or result
schema.

## Preconditions

1. The CloneCut API should be reachable, typically at `http://127.0.0.1:18100`.
2. The video path must exist locally.
3. If you are on the Windows host with the repo checkout available, the wrapper
   script assumes the repo-local runtime:
   - `D:\clonecut\.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe` (preferred)
   - `D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_task_client.py`
4. If you are inside a Docker/Linux OpenClaw workspace, prefer the Node helper
   that ships with this skill:
   - `{baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs`
   - API base is usually `http://host.docker.internal:18100`
5. If OpenClaw is running natively on macOS, the Node helper defaults to
   `http://127.0.0.1:18100`; use `--api-base` only when CloneCut is on another host.

## Runtime selection

1. If both `powershell` and `D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1`
   are available, use the Windows wrapper.
2. Otherwise, use the Node helper at `{baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs`.
3. If neither runtime is available, stop and tell the user what is missing.

## Preferred command on Windows host

```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1 `
  -File "D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4" `
  -ApiBase "http://127.0.0.1:18100" `
  -Stage5ModelName "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
```

## Preferred command in Docker/Linux workspace

```bash
node {baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs \
  --file "/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/test.mp4" \
  --api-base "http://host.docker.internal:18100" \
  --stage5-model-name "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
```

Optional flags:

- `--clip-text "..."` or `-ClipText "..."` to inject explicit clip text
- `--post-url "..."` or `-PostUrl "..."` to pass forum context
- `--no-wait` or `-NoWait` to submit without polling
- `--output-json "/path/result.json"` or `-OutputJson "D:\path\result.json"` to persist the full response

## Result contract

The command returns normalized JSON. When waiting is enabled, the final payload
includes:

- `submit.task_id`
- `result.openclaw_result.status`
- `result.openclaw_result.progress`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.final_video`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.subtitle_srt`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.clip_text`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.cover_image`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.forum_post_info`
- `result.openclaw_result.outputs.processing_log`

## How to report back

Summarize the result in product terms, not raw plumbing:

1. Whether the task completed
2. Final video filename/path
3. Subtitle artifact availability
4. Clip text availability
5. Cover image availability
6. Any failure or timeout details

## If the API is already running but the task is still processing

Use the task's `openclaw_result_url` or rerun the helper without `--no-wait`.

## If the API is not running

Tell the user the API service needs to be started first, then stop. Do not
invent outputs or claim the pipeline ran.

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: #!/usr/bin/env node import { access, readFile } from "node:fs/promises"; import { constants as fsConstants, existsSync, openAsBlob } ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
#!/usr/bin/env node

import { access, readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { constants as fsConstants, existsSync, openAsBlob } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

async function isLikelyContainerRuntime() {
  if (process.platform !== "linux") {
    return false;
  }
  if (existsSync("/.dockerenv")) {
    return true;
  }
  try {
    const cgroup = await readFile("/proc/1/cgroup", "utf8");
    return /(docker|containerd|kubepods|podman)/i.test(cgroup);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

async function resolveDefaultApiBase() {
  if (process.platform === "win32" || process.platform === "darwin") {
    return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
  }
  if (await isLikelyContainerRuntime()) {
    return "http://host.docker.internal:18100";
  }
  return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
}

async function parseArgs(argv) {
  const options = {
    apiBase: await resolveDefaultApiBase(),
    file: "",
    apiToken: "",
    apiTokenEnv: "CLONECUT_API_TOKEN",
    taskId: "",
    source: "openclaw_skill",
    stage5ModelName: "",
    clipText: "",
    postUrl: "",
    wait: true,
    submitTimeoutSeconds: 30,
    waitTimeoutSeconds: 1800,
    pollIntervalSeconds: 5,
    requestTimeoutSeconds: 15,
    outputJson: "",
  };

  for (let index = 0; index < argv.length; index += 1) {
    const arg = String(argv[index] ?? "").trim();
    const nextValue = () => {
      index += 1;
      if (index >= argv.length) {
        throw new Error(`missing value for ${arg}`);
      }
      return String(argv[index] ?? "");
    };
    switch (arg) {
      case "--api-base":
        options.apiBase = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--file":
        options.file = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--api-token":
        options.apiToken = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--api-token-env":
        options.apiTokenEnv = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--task-id":
        options.taskId = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--source":
        options.source = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--stage5-model-name":
        options.stage5ModelName = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--clip-text":
        options.clipText = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--post-url":
        options.postUrl = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--no-wait":
        options.wait = false;
        break;
      case "--submit-timeout-seconds":
        options.submitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--wait-timeout-seconds":
        options.waitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--poll-interval-seconds":
        options.pollIntervalSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--request-timeout-seconds":
        options.requestTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--output-json":
        options.outputJson = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--help":
      case "-h":
        printHelp();
        process.exit(0);
        break;
      default:
        throw new Error(`unknown argument: ${arg}`);
    }
  }

  if (!options.file) {
    throw new Error("--file is required");
  }
  return options;
}

function printHelp() {
  const lines = [
    "Usage: node run_clonecut_task.mjs --file <video> [options]",
    "",
    "Options:",
    "  --api-base <url>                 CloneCut API base URL",
    "  --file <path>                    Local video path to upload",
    "  --api-token <token>              Optional CloneCut API token",
    "  --api-token-env <name>           Optional env var for api token",
    "  --task-id <id>                   Explicit task id",
    "  --source <text>                  Task source marker",
    "  --stage5-model-name <name>       Stage5 model/backend model id",
    "  --clip-text <text>               Explicit clip text override",
    "  --post-url <url>                 Optional forum post url",
    "  --no-wait                        Submit without polling result",
    "  --submit-timeout-seconds <n>     Submit request timeout",
    "  --wait-timeout-seconds <n>       Total polling timeout",
    "  --poll-interval-seconds <n>      Poll interval",
    "  --request-timeout-seconds <n>    Single polling request timeout",
    "  --output-json <path>             Persist final JSON payload",
  ];
  console.log(lines.join("\n"));
}

function normalizeApiBase(apiBase) {
  const text = String(apiBase ?? "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  if (!text) {
    throw new Error("apiBase is required");
  }
  return text;
}

function resolveApiUrl(apiBase, suffix) {
  const base = normalizeApiBase(apiBase);
  const pathSuffix = String(suffix ?? "").trim();
  if (!pathSuffix) {
    return base;
  }
  return pathSuffix.startsWith("/") ? `${base}${pathSuffix}` : `${base}/${pathSuffix}`;
}

function buildHeaders(apiToken) {
  const token = String(apiToken ?? "").trim();
  return token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {};
}

async function ensureFileExists(filePath) {
  await access(filePath, fsConstants.R_OK);
}

async function parseJsonResponse(response, context) {
  const text = await response.text();
  let payload;
  try {
    payload = JSON.parse(text);
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(
      `${context} returned non-JSON response: status=${response.status} body=${text}`,
      { cause: error },
    );
  }
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) {
    throw new Error(`${context} returned invalid payload type`);
  }
  if (!payload.success) {
    const error = String(payload.error ?? "").trim() || `${context} failed`;
    throw new Error(`${context} failed: status=${response.status} error=${error}`);
  }
  return payload;
}

async function fetchJson(url, init, context, timeoutSeconds) {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), Math.max(1, timeoutSeconds) * 1000);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { ...init, signal: controller.signal });
    return await parseJsonResponse(response, context);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

async function submitTask(options) {
  const filePath = path.resolve(options.file);
  await ensureFileExists(filePath);

  const form = new FormData();
  form.set("source", String(options.source));
  if (options.taskId) {
    form.set("task_id", String(options.taskId));
  }
  if (options.stage5ModelName) {
    form.set("stage5_model_name", String(options.stage5ModelName));
  }
  if (options.clipText) {
    form.set("clip_text", String(options.clipText));
  }
  if (options.postUrl) {
    form.set("post_url", String(options.postUrl));
  }

  const blob = await openAsBlob(filePath);
  const file = new File([blob], path.basename(filePath), {
    type: filePath.toLowerCase().endsWith(".mp4") ? "video/mp4" : "application/octet-stream",
  });
  form.set("file", file, file.name);

  return fetchJson(
    resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, "/api/tasks/upload-video"),
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
      body: form,
    },
    "submit openclaw video task",
    options.submitTimeoutSeconds,
  );
}

async function fetchOpenclawResult(options, taskId) {
  return fetchJson(
    resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, `/api/tasks/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}/openclaw-result`),
    {
      method: "GET",
      headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
    },
    "fetch openclaw result",
    options.requestTimeoutSeconds,
  );
}

async function waitForResult(options, taskId) {
  const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(1, options.waitTimeoutSeconds) * 1000;
  while (true) {
    const payload = await fetchOpenclawResult(options, taskId);
    const result =
      payload.openclaw_result && typeof payload.openclaw_result === "object"
        ? payload.openclaw_result
        : {};
    const status = String(result.status ?? "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (["completed", "failed", "cancelled"].includes(status)) {
      return payload;
    }
    if (Date.now() >= deadline) {
      throw new Error(
        `wait openclaw result timed out: task_id=${taskId} status=${status || "unknown"}`,
      );
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) =>
      setTimeout(resolve, Math.max(0.2, options.pollIntervalSeconds) * 1000),
    );
  }
}

async function writeJsonIfNeeded(outputJson, payload) {
  if (!outputJson) {
    return;
  }
  const { mkdir, writeFile } = await import("node:fs/promises");
  const outputPath = path.resolve(outputJson);
  await mkdir(path.dirname(outputPath), { recursive: true });
  await writeFile(outputPath, `${JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)}\n`, "utf8");
}

async function main() {
  const options = await parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));
  options.apiToken =
    String(options.apiToken || "").trim() ||
    String(process.env[String(options.apiTokenEnv || "").trim()] || "").trim();

  const payload = {
    submit: await submitTask(options),
  };

  if (options.wait) {
    const taskId = String(payload.submit.task_id ?? "").trim();
    if (!taskId) {
      throw new Error("submit response missing task_id");
    }
    payload.result = await waitForResult(options, taskId);
  }

  const text = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  console.log(text);
  await writeJsonIfNeeded(options.outputJson, payload);
}

main().catch((error) => {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
  console.error(message);
  if (error instanceof Error && error.cause) {
    console.error(`cause: ${String(error.cause)}`);
  }
  process.exit(1);
});

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\skills\clonecut-video-pipeline\SKILL.md
@@
 name: clonecut_video_pipeline
-description: Submit a local video into CloneCut's OpenClaw-integrated production pipeline and read back the normalized openclaw_result payload.
+description: Submit a local video into CloneCut's production pipeline and read back the normalized task_result payload.
@@
 existing CloneCut production chain and return structured outputs such as final
 video, subtitles, clip text, cover image, and task progress.
@@
 3. If you are on the Windows host with the repo checkout available, the wrapper
    script assumes the repo-local runtime:
    - `D:\clonecut\.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe` (preferred)
-   - `D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_task_client.py`
+   - `D:\clonecut\scripts\clonecut_task_client.py`
@@
-1. If both `powershell` and `D:\clonecut\scripts\openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1`
+1. If both `powershell` and `D:\clonecut\scripts\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
    are available, use the Windows wrapper.
@@

-  -File "D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4" `

 includes:
 
 - `submit.task_id`
-- `result.openclaw_result.status`
-- `result.openclaw_result.progress`
