Output:
#!/usr/bin/env node

import { access, readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { constants as fsConstants, existsSync, openAsBlob } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";

async function isLikelyContainerRuntime() {
  if (process.platform !== "linux") {
    return false;
  }
  if (existsSync("/.dockerenv")) {
    return true;
  }
  try {
    const cgroup = await readFile("/proc/1/cgroup", "utf8");
    return /(docker|containerd|kubepods|podman)/i.test(cgroup);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

async function resolveDefaultApiBase() {
  if (process.platform === "win32" || process.platform === "darwin") {
    return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
  }
  if (await isLikelyContainerRuntime()) {
    return "http://host.docker.internal:18100";
  }
  return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
}

async function parseArgs(argv) {
  const options = {
    apiBase: await resolveDefaultApiBase(),
    file: "",
    apiToken: "",
    apiTokenEnv: "CLONECUT_API_TOKEN",
    taskId: "",
    source: "clonecut_skill",
    stage5ModelName: "",
    clipText: "",
    postUrl: "",
    wait: true,
    submitTimeoutSeconds: 30,
    waitTimeoutSeconds: 1800,
    pollIntervalSeconds: 5,
    requestTimeoutSeconds: 15,
    outputJson: "",
  };

  for (let index = 0; index < argv.length; index += 1) {
    const arg = String(argv[index] ?? "").trim();
    const nextValue = () => {
      index += 1;
      if (index >= argv.length) {
        throw new Error(`missing value for ${arg}`);
      }
      return String(argv[index] ?? "");
    };
    switch (arg) {
      case "--api-base":
        options.apiBase = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--file":
        options.file = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--api-token":
        options.apiToken = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--api-token-env":
        options.apiTokenEnv = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--task-id":
        options.taskId = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--source":
        options.source = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--stage5-model-name":
        options.stage5ModelName = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--clip-text":
        options.clipText = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--post-url":
        options.postUrl = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--no-wait":
        options.wait = false;
        break;
      case "--submit-timeout-seconds":
        options.submitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--wait-timeout-seconds":
        options.waitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--poll-interval-seconds":
        options.pollIntervalSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--request-timeout-seconds":
        options.requestTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
        break;
      case "--output-json":
        options.outputJson = nextValue();
        break;
      case "--help":
      case "-h":
        printHelp();
        process.exit(0);
        break;
      default:
        throw new Error(`unknown argument: ${arg}`);
    }
  }

  if (!options.file) {
    throw new Error("--file is required");
  }
  return options;
}

function printHelp() {
  const lines = [
    "Usage: node run_clonecut_task.mjs --file <video> [options]",
    "",
    "Options:",
    "  --api-base <url>                 CloneCut API base URL",
    "  --file <path>                    Local video path to upload",
    "  --api-token <token>              Optional CloneCut API token",
    "  --api-token-env <name>           Optional env var for api token",
    "  --task-id <id>                   Explicit task id",
    "  --source <text>                  Task source marker",
    "  --stage5-model-name <name>       Stage5 model/backend model id",
    "  --clip-text <text>               Explicit clip text override",
    "  --post-url <url>                 Optional forum post url",
    "  --no-wait                        Submit without polling result",
    "  --submit-timeout-seconds <n>     Submit request timeout",
    "  --wait-timeout-seconds <n>       Total polling timeout",
    "  --poll-interval-seconds <n>      Poll interval",
    "  --request-timeout-seconds <n>    Single polling request timeout",
    "  --output-json <path>             Persist final JSON payload",
  ];
  console.log(lines.join("\n"));
}

function normalizeApiBase(apiBase) {
  const text = String(apiBase ?? "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  if (!text) {
    throw new Error("apiBase is required");
  }
  return text;
}

function resolveApiUrl(apiBase, suffix) {
  const base = normalizeApiBase(apiBase);
  const pathSuffix = String(suffix ?? "").trim();
  if (!pathSuffix) {
    return base;
  }
  return pathSuffix.startsWith("/") ? `${base}${pathSuffix}` : `${base}/${pathSuffix}`;
}

function buildHeaders(apiToken) {
  const token = String(apiToken ?? "").trim();
  return token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {};
}

async function ensureFileExists(filePath) {
  await access(filePath, fsConstants.R_OK);
}

async function parseJsonResponse(response, context) {
  const text = await response.text();
  let payload;
  try {
    payload = JSON.parse(text);
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(
      `${context} returned non-JSON response: status=${response.status} body=${text}`,
      { cause: error },
    );
  }
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) {
    throw new Error(`${context} returned invalid payload type`);
  }
  if (!payload.success) {
    const error = String(payload.error ?? "").trim() || `${context} failed`;
    throw new Error(`${context} failed: status=${response.status} error=${error}`);
  }
  return payload;
}

async function fetchJson(url, init, context, timeoutSeconds) {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), Math.max(1, timeoutSeconds) * 1000);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { ...init, signal: controller.signal });
    return await parseJsonResponse(response, context);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

async function submitTask(options) {
  const filePath = path.resolve(options.file);
  await ensureFileExists(filePath);

  const form = new FormData();
  form.set("source", String(options.source));
  if (options.taskId) {
    form.set("task_id", String(options.taskId));
  }
  if (options.stage5ModelName) {
    form.set("stage5_model_name", String(options.stage5ModelName));
  }
  if (options.clipText) {
    form.set("clip_text", String(options.clipText));
  }
  if (options.postUrl) {
    form.set("post_url", String(options.postUrl));
  }

  const blob = await openAsBlob(filePath);
  const file = new File([blob], path.basename(filePath), {
    type: filePath.toLowerCase().endsWith(".mp4") ? "video/mp4" : "application/octet-stream",
  });
  form.set("file", file, file.name);

  return fetchJson(
    resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, "/api/tasks/video"),
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
      body: form,
    },
    "submit video task",
    options.submitTimeoutSeconds,
  );
}

async function fetchTaskResult(options, taskId) {
  return fetchJson(
    resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, `/api/tasks/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}/result`),
    {
      method: "GET",
      headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
    },
    "fetch task result",
    options.requestTimeoutSeconds,
  );
}

async function waitForResult(options, taskId) {
  const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(1, options.waitTimeoutSeconds) * 1000;
  while (true) {
    const payload = await fetchTaskResult(options, taskId);
    const result =
      payload.task_result && typeof payload.task_result === "object"
        ? payload.task_result
        : {};
    const status = String(result.status ?? "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (["completed", "failed", "cancelled"].includes(status)) {
      return payload;
    }
    if (Date.now() >= deadline) {
      throw new Error(
        `wait task result timed out: task_id=${taskId} status=${status || "unknown"}`,
      );
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) =>
      setTimeout(resolve, Math.max(0.2, options.pollIntervalSeconds) * 1000),
    );
  }
}

async function writeJsonIfNeeded(outputJson, payload) {
  if (!outputJson) {
    return;
  }
  const { mkdir, writeFile } = await import("node:fs/promises");
  const outputPath = path.resolve(outputJson);
  await mkdir(path.dirname(outputPath), { recursive: true });
  await writeFile(outputPath, `${JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)}\n`, "utf8");
}

async function main() {
  const options = await parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));
  options.apiToken =
    String(options.apiToken || "").trim() ||
    String(process.env[String(options.apiTokenEnv || "").trim()] || "").trim();

  const payload = {
    submit: await submitTask(options),
  };

  if (options.wait) {
    const taskId = String(payload.submit.task_id ?? "").trim();
    if (!taskId) {
      throw new Error("submit response missing task_id");
    }
    payload.result = await waitForResult(options, taskId);
  }

  const text = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  console.log(text);
  await writeJsonIfNeeded(options.outputJson, payload);
}

main().catch((error) => {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
  console.error(message);
  if (error instanceof Error && error.cause) {
    console.error(`cause: ${String(error.cause)}`);
  }
  process.exit(1);
});

Output:
---
name: clonecut_video_pipeline
description: Submit a local video into CloneCut's production pipeline and read back the normalized task_result payload.
---

# CloneCut Video Pipeline

Use this skill when the user wants OpenClaw to process a local video through the
existing CloneCut production chain and return structured outputs such as final
video, subtitles, clip text, cover image, and task progress.

## Goal

Run the real CloneCut pipeline through the local API instead of manually
describing steps. Prefer the wrapper that matches the current runtime so the
caller does not need to remember upload endpoints, polling logic, or result
schema.

## Preconditions

1. The CloneCut API should be reachable, typically at `http://127.0.0.1:18100`.
2. The video path must exist locally.
3. If you are on the Windows host with the repo checkout available, the wrapper
   script assumes the repo-local runtime:
   - `D:\clonecut\.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe` (preferred)
   - `D:\clonecut\scripts\clonecut_task_client.py`
4. If you are inside a Docker/Linux OpenClaw workspace, prefer the Node helper
   that ships with this skill:
   - `{baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs`
   - API base is usually `http://host.docker.internal:18100`
5. If OpenClaw is running natively on macOS, the Node helper defaults to
   `http://127.0.0.1:18100`; use `--api-base` only when CloneCut is on another host.

## Runtime selection

1. If both `powershell` and `D:\clonecut\scripts\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
   are available, use the Windows wrapper.
2. Otherwise, use the Node helper at `{baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs`.
3. If neither runtime is available, stop and tell the user what is missing.

## Preferred command on Windows host

```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\clonecut\scripts\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1 `
  -VideoPath "D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4" `
  -ApiBase "http://127.0.0.1:18100" `
  -Stage5ModelName "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
```

## Preferred command in Docker/Linux workspace

```bash
node {baseDir}/run_clonecut_task.mjs \
  --file "/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/test.mp4" \
  --api-base "http://host.docker.internal:18100" \
  --stage5-model-name "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
```

Optional flags:

- `--clip-text "..."` or `-ClipText "..."` to inject explicit clip text
- `--post-url "..."` or `-PostUrl "..."` to pass forum context
- `--no-wait` or `-NoWait` to submit without polling
- `--output-json "/path/result.json"` or `-OutputJson "D:\path\result.json"` to persist the full response

## Result contract

The command returns normalized JSON. When waiting is enabled, the final payload
includes:

- `submit.task_id`
- `result.task_result.status`
- `result.task_result.progress`
- `result.task_result.outputs.final_video`
- `result.task_result.outputs.subtitle_srt`
- `result.task_result.outputs.clip_text`
- `result.task_result.outputs.cover_image`
- `result.task_result.outputs.forum_post_info`
- `result.task_result.outputs.processing_log`

## How to report back

Summarize the result in product terms, not raw plumbing:

1. Whether the task completed
2. Final video filename/path
3. Subtitle artifact availability
4. Clip text availability
5. Cover image availability
6. Any failure or timeout details

## If the API is already running but the task is still processing

Use the task's `result_url` or rerun the helper without `--no-wait`.

## If the API is not running

Tell the user the API service needs to be started first, then stop. Do not
invent outputs or claim the pipeline ran.

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import copy
import json
import logging
import mimetypes
import os
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
from datetime import datetime
from functools import wraps
from typing import Any
import uuid

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request, send_file
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader
from werkzeug.utils import secure_filename

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION = "1.0"


def _parse_optional_bool(value: Any) -> bool | None:
    if value is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(value, bool):
        return value
    text = str(value).strip().lower()
    if not text:
        return None
    if text in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}:
        return True
    if text in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off"}:
        return False
    return None


def _should_start_embedded_worker(cfg: Any) -> bool:
    env_value = _parse_optional_bool(os.getenv("CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER"))
    if env_value is not None:
        return env_value

    raw = getattr(cfg, "raw", None)
    if isinstance(raw, dict):
        api_cfg = raw.get("api", {}) or {}
        cfg_value = _parse_optional_bool(
            api_cfg.get("start_worker", api_cfg.get("start_embedded_worker"))
        )
        if cfg_value is not None:
            return cfg_value

    return False


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])

    _api_token: str = os.getenv("CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", "").strip()
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"
    _api_upload_root = Path(getattr(service.config, "input_dir", "input")) / "_api_uploads"
    _api_upload_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    def _parse_optional_bool(value: Any) -> Any:
        if value is None:
            return None
        if isinstance(value, bool):
            return value
        text = str(value).strip().lower()
        if not text:
            return None
        if text in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}:
            return True
        if text in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off"}:
            return False
        return None

    def _parse_json_object_field(field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raw = str(request.form.get(field_name, "") or "").strip()
        if not raw:
            return {}
        try:
            parsed = json.loads(raw)
        except Exception as exc:
            raise ValueError(f"invalid {field_name}: {exc}") from exc
        if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
            raise ValueError(f"invalid {field_name}: expected JSON object")
        return dict(parsed)

    def _resolve_download_path(task: dict[str, Any]) -> Path | None:
        result = task.get("result") if isinstance(task.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        for artifact in artifacts:
            if not isinstance(artifact, dict) or not artifact.get("is_primary"):
                continue
            candidate = str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip()
            if not candidate:
                continue
            path = Path(candidate)
            if path.exists() and path.is_file():
                return path
        upload = result.get("upload") if isinstance(result.get("upload"), dict) else {}
        candidates = [
            str(upload.get("uploaded_path") or "").strip(),
            str(task.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
            str(result.get("named_output_path") or "").strip(),
            str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
        ]
        for candidate in candidates:
            if not candidate:
                continue
            path = Path(candidate)
            if path.exists() and path.is_file():
                return path
        return None

    def _build_status_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}"

    def _build_download_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/download"

    def _build_artifacts_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts"

    def _build_artifact_download_url(task_id: str, artifact_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download"

    def _build_task_result_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/result"

    def _find_task_artifact(task: dict[str, Any], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
        result = task.get("result") if isinstance(task.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
        if not target:
            return None
        for artifact in artifacts:
            if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
                continue
            if str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip() == target:
                return artifact
        return None

    def _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id: dict[str, dict[str, Any]], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
        target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
        if not target:
            return None
        artifact = artifacts_by_id.get(target)
        if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
            return None
        return {
            "artifact_id": target,
            "role": artifact.get("role"),
            "kind": artifact.get("kind"),
            "filename": artifact.get("filename"),
            "path": artifact.get("path"),
            "relative_path": artifact.get("relative_path"),
            "download_url": artifact.get("download_url"),
            "is_primary": bool(artifact.get("is_primary")),
        }

    def _compact_json_like(value: Any) -> Any:
        if isinstance(value, dict):
            compacted: dict[str, Any] = {}
            for key, item in value.items():
                normalized = _compact_json_like(item)
                if normalized in (None, "", [], {}):
                    continue
                compacted[str(key)] = normalized
            return compacted
        if isinstance(value, list):
            compacted_list = [_compact_json_like(item) for item in value]
            return [item for item in compacted_list if item not in (None, "", [], {})]
        return value

    def _build_task_result(task: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
        decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_task_result=False)
        task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
        result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
        render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        artifacts_by_id = {
            str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip(): item
            for item in artifacts
            if isinstance(item, dict) and str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
        }
        videos = render_manifest.get("videos") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("videos"), dict) else {}
        subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("subtitles"), dict) else {}
        texts = render_manifest.get("texts") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("texts"), dict) else {}
        context = render_manifest.get("context") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("context"), dict) else {}
        cover = render_manifest.get("cover") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("cover"), dict) else {}
        logs = render_manifest.get("logs") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("logs"), dict) else {}
        pipeline_state = (
            render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("pipeline_state"), dict) else {}
        )

        task_result = {
            "schema_version": RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "task_id": task_id,
            "status": decorated.get("status"),
            "is_ready": str(decorated.get("status") or "").strip().lower() == "completed",
            "executed_mode": result.get("executed_mode"),
            "status_url": decorated.get("status_url"),
            "download_url": decorated.get("download_url"),
            "artifacts_url": decorated.get("artifacts_url"),
            "progress": {
                "current_stage": decorated.get("current_stage"),
                "stage_checkpoint": decorated.get("stage_checkpoint"),
                "last_completed_step": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step"),
                "last_completed_step_name": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step_name"),
            },
            "outputs": {
                "final_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("primary") or "")),
                "subtitled_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("subtitled") or "")),
                "no_subtitle_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("no_subtitle") or "")),
                "coverless_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("coverless") or "")),
                "alternate_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("alternate") or "")),
                "subtitle_srt": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("srt") or "")),
                "subtitle_ass": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("ass") or "")),
                "script_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(
                    artifacts_by_id,
                    str(texts.get("script") or subtitles.get("script") or ""),
                ),
                "clip_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(texts.get("clip_text") or "")),
                "cover_image": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(cover.get("image") or "")),
                "forum_post_info": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(context.get("forum_post_info") or "")),
                "processing_log": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(logs.get("processing") or "")),
            },
            "manifest": {
                "primary_artifact_id": render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id"),
                "primary_download_url": render_manifest.get("primary_download_url"),
                "artifact_count": render_manifest.get("artifact_count"),
            },
        }
        return _compact_json_like(task_result)

    def _decorate_task_for_api(task: dict[str, Any], include_task_result: bool = False) -> dict[str, Any]:
        decorated = copy.deepcopy(task)
        task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
        if not task_id:
            return decorated

        decorated["status_url"] = _build_status_url(task_id)
        decorated["download_url"] = _build_download_url(task_id)
        decorated["artifacts_url"] = _build_artifacts_url(task_id)
        decorated["result_url"] = _build_task_result_url(task_id)

        result = decorated.get("result")
        if not isinstance(result, dict):
            if include_task_result:
                decorated["task_result"] = _build_task_result(decorated)
            return decorated

        artifacts = result.get("artifacts")
        if isinstance(artifacts, list):
            for artifact in artifacts:
                if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
                    continue
                artifact_id = str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
                if artifact_id:
                    artifact["download_url"] = _build_artifact_download_url(task_id, artifact_id)

        render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest")
        if isinstance(render_manifest, dict):
            primary_artifact_id = str(render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id") or "").strip()
            if primary_artifact_id:
                render_manifest["primary_download_url"] = _build_artifact_download_url(task_id, primary_artifact_id)
        if include_task_result:
            decorated["task_result"] = _build_task_result(decorated)
        return decorated

    def _save_uploaded_video(task_id: str) -> tuple[Path, str, int]:
        uploaded = request.files.get("file")
        if uploaded is None:
            raise ValueError("missing file field")
        filename = secure_filename(str(uploaded.filename or "").strip()) or "video.mp4"
        suffix = Path(filename).suffix.lower()
        content_type = str(uploaded.content_type or "").strip().lower()
        allowed_suffixes = {".mp4", ".mov", ".mkv", ".avi", ".m4v", ".webm"}
        if suffix and suffix not in allowed_suffixes and not content_type.startswith("video/"):
            raise ValueError(f"unsupported video file type: {suffix or content_type or 'unknown'}")

        task_dir = _api_upload_root / task_id
        task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        target = task_dir / filename
        uploaded.save(str(target))
        size_bytes = target.stat().st_size
        if size_bytes <= 0:
            target.unlink(missing_ok=True)
            raise ValueError("uploaded file is empty")
        return target, filename, size_bytes

    def _build_upload_task_payload(task_id: str, source_path: Path, original_filename: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        payload = _parse_json_object_field("payload")
        metadata = _parse_json_object_field("metadata")
        forum_post_info = _parse_json_object_field("forum_post_info")

        for key in ("clip_text", "stage5_model_name", "stage5_file_encoding", "post_url"):
            value = str(request.form.get(key, "") or "").strip()
            if value:
                payload[key] = value
                metadata[key] = value

        stage5_use_preprocessor = _parse_optional_bool(request.form.get("stage5_use_preprocessor"))
        if stage5_use_preprocessor is not None:
            payload["stage5_use_preprocessor"] = stage5_use_preprocessor
            metadata["stage5_use_preprocessor"] = stage5_use_preprocessor

        if forum_post_info:
            payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info

        metadata.setdefault("source", str(request.form.get("source", "openclaw_upload")).strip() or "openclaw_upload")
        metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
        metadata["uploaded_via"] = "api_multipart"

        task_type = str(request.form.get("task_type", "video") or "video").strip() or "video"
        priority = str(request.form.get("priority", "normal") or "normal").strip() or "normal"

        task_payload: dict[str, Any] = {
            "task_id": task_id,
            "task_type": task_type,
            "priority": priority,
            "source_path": str(source_path),
            "payload": payload,
            "metadata": metadata,
        }

        post_url = str(request.form.get("post_url", "") or "").strip()
        if post_url:
            task_payload["post_url"] = post_url
        return task_payload

    def _require_token(f):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        @wraps(f)
        def decorated(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any:
            if not _api_token:
                return f(*args, **kwargs)
            auth = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
            token = auth.removeprefix("Bearer ").strip() if auth.startswith("Bearer ") else ""
            if not token:
                token = request.args.get("token", "").strip()
            if token != _api_token:
                return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "unauthorized"}), 401
            return f(*args, **kwargs)

        return decorated

    @app.get("/")
    def dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut API Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/web/worker")
    def worker_dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut API Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/health")
    def health() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"status": "ok", "service": "api"})

    @app.get("/api/ping")
    def ping() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "message": "clonecut api online"})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/status")
    def mock_worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **build_worker_status()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/resources")
    def mock_worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": build_worker_resources()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_tasks() -> Any:
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "10")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
        except ValueError:
            limit = 10
        tasks = build_worker_tasks(limit=limit)
        return jsonify({"success": True, "tasks": tasks, "total": len(tasks), "limit": limit, "offset": 0})

    @app.post("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_submit() -> Any:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        source_url = str(payload.get("source_url", "")).strip()
        if not source_url:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "missing source_url"}), 400
        task_id = f"mock-submit-{datetime.now().strftime('%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.get("/api/status")
    def status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **service.get_status()})

    @app.get("/api/queues")
    def queue_status() -> Any:
        payload = service.get_status()
        return jsonify(
            {
                "success": True,
                "queue_sizes": payload.get("queue_sizes", {}),
                "queues": payload.get("queues", {}),
                "task_status_counts": payload.get("task_status_counts", {}),
                "timestamp": payload.get("timestamp"),
            }
        )

    @app.get("/api/resources")
    def resources_current() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/resources/history")
    def resources_history() -> Any:
        try:
            minutes = max(1, min(1440, int(request.args.get("minutes", "60"))))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid minutes param"}), 400
        return jsonify(
            {"success": True, "minutes": minutes, "history": service.get_resources_history(minutes=minutes)}
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks")
    def list_tasks() -> Any:
        status = request.args.get("status")
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
        offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
            offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400

        try:
            payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        tasks = payload.get("tasks") if isinstance(payload.get("tasks"), list) else []
        payload["tasks"] = [_decorate_task_for_api(task) for task in tasks if isinstance(task, dict)]
        return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})

    @app.post("/api/tasks")
    @_require_token
    def create_task() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.post("/api/tasks/video")
    @_require_token
    def upload_video_task() -> Any:
        requested_task_id = str(request.form.get("task_id", "") or "").strip()
        task_id = requested_task_id or str(uuid.uuid4())
        stored_path: Path | None = None
        stored_dir: Path | None = None
        try:
            stored_path, filename, size_bytes = _save_uploaded_video(task_id=task_id)
            stored_dir = stored_path.parent
            submit_payload = _build_upload_task_payload(
                task_id=task_id,
                source_path=stored_path,
                original_filename=filename,
            )
            ok, resolved_task_id, error = service.submit(submit_payload)
            if not ok:
                raise ValueError(error or "invalid task payload")
        except ValueError as exc:
            if stored_dir is not None and stored_dir.exists():
                shutil.rmtree(stored_dir, ignore_errors=True)
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        except Exception as exc:
            if stored_dir is not None and stored_dir.exists():
                shutil.rmtree(stored_dir, ignore_errors=True)
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": f"upload task failed: {exc}"}), 500

        return (
            jsonify(
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": resolved_task_id,
                    "filename": filename,
                    "stored_path": str(stored_path),
                    "file_size_bytes": size_bytes,
                    "status_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}",
                    "download_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/download",
                    "artifacts_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/artifacts",
                    "result_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/result",
                }
            ),
            201,
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>")
    def task_detail(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_task_result=True)})

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts")
    def task_artifacts(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task)
        result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
        return jsonify(
            {
                "success": True,
                "task_id": task_id,
                "artifacts": artifacts,
                "render_manifest": render_manifest,
                "download_url": _build_download_url(task_id),
            }
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/result")
    def task_result(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify(
            {
                "success": True,
                "task_id": task_id,
                "task_result": _build_task_result(task),
            }
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/download")
    @_require_token
    def task_download(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        status = str(task.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
        if status not in {"completed", "uploading", "processing"}:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": f"task output not ready: status={status or 'unknown'}"}), 409

        download_path = _resolve_download_path(task)
        if download_path is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "downloadable output not found"}), 404

        return send_file(
            download_path,
            as_attachment=True,
            download_name=download_path.name,
            mimetype="video/mp4",
            conditional=True,
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts/<artifact_id>/download")
    @_require_token
    def task_artifact_download(task_id: str, artifact_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        artifact = _find_task_artifact(task, artifact_id)
        if artifact is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "artifact not found"}), 404

        artifact_path = Path(str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip())
        if not artifact_path.exists() or not artifact_path.is_file():
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "artifact file not found"}), 404

        guessed_mime, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(artifact_path.name)
        mime_type = str(artifact.get("mime_type") or guessed_mime or "application/octet-stream")
        return send_file(
            artifact_path,
            as_attachment=True,
            download_name=artifact_path.name,
            mimetype=mime_type,
            conditional=True,
        )

    @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/cancel")
    @_require_token
    def cancel_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        ok, error = service.cancel_task(task_id)
        if not ok:
            code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})

    @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/retry")
    @_require_token
    def retry_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        ok, error = service.retry_task(task_id)
        if not ok:
            code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut API service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "api"
    cfg.port = args.port or cfg.port
    cfg.host = args.host or cfg.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.api")
    logger.info("api booting env=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.host, cfg.port)

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    embedded_worker_started = _should_start_embedded_worker(cfg)
    if embedded_worker_started:
        logger.info("api embedded worker enabled")
        service.start()
    else:
        logger.info("api embedded worker disabled; expecting dedicated worker service")
    app = create_app(service)
    try:
        _run_http(app, cfg.host, cfg.port, logger)
    finally:
        if embedded_worker_started:
            service.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from apps.api.task_client import run_video_task, submit_video_task, wait_for_task_result


class _FakeResponse:
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
        self.status_code = status_code
        self._payload = payload
        self.text = str(payload)

    def json(self):
        return self._payload


class _FakeSession:
    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
        self.post_calls = []
        self.get_calls = []

    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.post_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
        return self.post_responses.pop(0)

    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.get_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
        return self.get_responses.pop(0)


def test_submit_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/result",
                },
            )
        ]
    )

    payload = submit_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        api_token="token-1",
        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
    call = session.post_calls[0]
    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/video"
    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"


def test_wait_for_task_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    session = _FakeSession(
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "task_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "processing"},
                },
            ),
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "task_result": {
                        "schema_version": "1.0",
                        "status": "completed",
                        "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}},
                    },
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.task_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = wait_for_task_result(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        task_id="task-123",
        poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert payload.get("task_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
    assert len(session.get_calls) == 2


def test_run_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                },
            )
        ],
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                    "task_result": {"schema_version": "1.0", "status": "completed"},
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.task_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = run_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        wait=True,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("submit", {}).get("task_id") == "task-789"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("task_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"


def test_submit_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
    missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        submit_video_task(
            api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
            video_path=missing,
        )

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task, submit_openclaw_video_task, wait_for_openclaw_result


class _FakeResponse:
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
        self.status_code = status_code
        self._payload = payload
        self.text = str(payload)

    def json(self):
        return self._payload


class _FakeSession:
    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
        self.post_calls = []
        self.get_calls = []

    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.post_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
        return self.post_responses.pop(0)

    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.get_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
        return self.get_responses.pop(0)


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/openclaw-result",
                },
            )
        ]
    )

    payload = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        api_token="token-1",
        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
    call = session.post_calls[0]
    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/upload-video"
    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"

                        "schema_version": "1.0",
                        "status": "completed",
                        "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}},

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace

from apps.api.main import create_app
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace="clonecut_api_integration:",
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 2,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1, 1, 1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "download_timeout_seconds": 30,
                "download_chunk_size": 4096,
                "use_internal_pipeline": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
            },
        },
    )


def test_api_task_lifecycle_list_and_cancel(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_lifecycle.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    source = tmp_path / "task-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")

    created = client.post(
        "/api/tasks",
        json={
            "task_type": "video",
            "source_url": str(source),
            "metadata": {"source": "api-test"},
        },
    )
    assert created.status_code == 201
    created_payload = created.get_json() or {}
    task_id = str(created_payload.get("task_id", "")).strip()
    assert task_id

    listed = client.get("/api/tasks", query_string={"status": "pending", "limit": 20, "offset": 0})
    assert listed.status_code == 200
    listed_payload = listed.get_json() or {}
    assert listed_payload.get("success") is True
    tasks = listed_payload.get("tasks") or []
    assert any(str(item.get("task_id")) == task_id for item in tasks)

    cancelled = client.post(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/cancel")
    assert cancelled.status_code == 200
    cancelled_payload = cancelled.get_json() or {}
    assert cancelled_payload.get("success") is True

    detail = client.get(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    assert detail_payload.get("success") is True
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("status") == TaskStatus.CANCELLED.value

    queue_status = client.get("/api/queues")
    assert queue_status.status_code == 200
    queue_payload = queue_status.get_json() or {}
    counts = queue_payload.get("task_status_counts") or {}
    assert int(counts.get(TaskStatus.CANCELLED.value, 0)) >= 1


def test_api_retry_failed_task(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_retry.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    source = tmp_path / "failed-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")
    failed = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="failed-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="api-test",
        source_path=str(source),
        status=TaskStatus.FAILED,
        metadata={
            "source": "api-test",
            "failed_from_status": TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value,
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(failed)

    retried = client.post("/api/tasks/failed-1/retry")
    assert retried.status_code == 200
    retried_payload = retried.get_json() or {}
    assert retried_payload.get("success") is True

    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/failed-1")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("status") == TaskStatus.PENDING.value
    metadata = task_payload.get("metadata") or {}
    assert metadata.get("manual_retry") is True

    queue_status = client.get("/api/queues")
    assert queue_status.status_code == 200
    queue_payload = queue_status.get_json() or {}
    queue_sizes = queue_payload.get("queue_sizes") or {}
    assert int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0)) >= 1


def test_api_tasks_invalid_status_filter_returns_400(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_invalid_status.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    response = client.get("/api/tasks", query_string={"status": "not-a-status"})
    assert response.status_code == 400
    payload = response.get_json() or {}
    assert payload.get("success") is False


def test_api_task_artifacts_list_and_download(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_artifacts.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "artifact-task-1"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_video = task_dir / "artifact-task-1_final.mp4"
    final_video.write_bytes(b"video")
    subtitle_srt = task_dir / "total.srt"
    subtitle_srt.write_text("1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nhello\n", encoding="utf-8")
    clip_text = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
    clip_text.write_text("鍓緫鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    forum_post_info = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
    forum_post_info.write_text('{"thread_id":"123"}', encoding="utf-8")
    cover_image = task_dir / "artifact-cover.png"
    cover_image.write_bytes(b"png")
    logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (logs_dir / "funclip_20260326_150000.log").write_text("ok", encoding="utf-8")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="artifact-task-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="api-test",
        status=TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
        output_path=str(final_video),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source")
    task.result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("artifacts_url") == "/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts"
    assert task_payload.get("result_url") == "/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/result"
    assert task_payload.get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    result = task_payload.get("result") or {}
    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
    assert artifacts
    subtitle_artifact = next(item for item in artifacts if item.get("role") == "subtitle_srt")
    clip_text_artifact = next(item for item in artifacts if item.get("role") == "clip_text")
    assert subtitle_artifact.get("download_url") == (
        f"/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts/{subtitle_artifact.get('artifact_id')}/download"
    )
    assert task_payload.get("task_result", {}).get("outputs", {}).get("clip_text", {}).get("artifact_id") == (
        clip_text_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    )

    listed = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/artifacts")
    assert listed.status_code == 200
    listed_payload = listed.get_json() or {}
    listed_artifacts = listed_payload.get("artifacts") or []
    assert any(item.get("role") == "cover_image" for item in listed_artifacts)
    assert listed_payload.get("render_manifest", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"

    subtitle_download = client.get(subtitle_artifact.get("download_url"))
    assert subtitle_download.status_code == 200
    assert b"hello" in subtitle_download.data

    task_result_resp = client.get("/api/tasks/artifact-task-1/result")
    assert task_result_resp.status_code == 200
    task_result_payload = task_result_resp.get_json() or {}
    task_result = task_result_payload.get("task_result") or {}
    assert task_result.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    outputs = task_result.get("outputs") or {}
    assert outputs.get("final_video", {}).get("filename") == "artifact-task-1_final.mp4"
    assert outputs.get("subtitle_srt", {}).get("artifact_id") == subtitle_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    assert outputs.get("clip_text", {}).get("artifact_id") == clip_text_artifact.get("artifact_id")
    assert outputs.get("forum_post_info", {}).get("filename") == "forum_post_info.json"
    assert outputs.get("processing_log", {}).get("filename") == "funclip_20260326_150000.log"


def test_api_task_detail_exposes_platform_neutral_task_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_task_result.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    app = create_app(service)
    client = app.test_client()

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "task-result-1"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_video = task_dir / "task-result-1_final.mp4"
    final_video.write_bytes(b"video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="task-result-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="api-test",
        status=TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
        output_path=str(final_video),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source")
    task.result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    detail = client.get("/api/tasks/task-result-1")
    assert detail.status_code == 200
    detail_payload = detail.get_json() or {}
    task_payload = detail_payload.get("task") or {}
    assert task_payload.get("result_url") == "/api/tasks/task-result-1/result"
    assert task_payload.get("task_result", {}).get("schema_version") == "1.0"

    result_resp = client.get("/api/tasks/task-result-1/result")
    assert result_resp.status_code == 200
    result_payload = result_resp.get_json() or {}
    task_result = result_payload.get("task_result") or {}
    assert task_result.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert task_result.get("outputs", {}).get("final_video", {}).get("filename") == "task-result-1_final.mp4"

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\tests\integration\test_api_task_management.py @@ def test_api_task_detail_exposes_platform_neutral_task_re...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\tests\integration\test_api_task_management.py
@@
 def test_api_task_detail_exposes_platform_neutral_task_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
@@
     result_payload = result_resp.get_json() or {}
     task_result = result_payload.get("task_result") or {}
     assert task_result.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
     assert task_result.get("outputs", {}).get("final_video", {}).get("filename") == "task-result-1_final.mp4"
+
+
+def test_api_video_upload_uses_canonical_urls_and_platform_neutral_default_source(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_upload_video.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+    captured_submit: dict[str, object] = {}
+
+    def _fake_submit(payload):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        captured_submit["payload"] = payload
+        return True, str(payload.get("task_id") or ""), ""
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "submit", _fake_submit)
+    app = create_app(service)
+    client = app.test_client()
+
+    video = tmp_path / "upload-source.mp4"
+    video.write_bytes(b"video")
+
+    with video.open("rb") as handle:
+        response = client.post(
+            "/api/tasks/video",
+            data={
+                "file": (handle, "upload-source.mp4"),
+            },
+            content_type="multipart/form-data",
+        )
+
+    assert response.status_code == 201
+    payload = response.get_json() or {}
+    task_id = str(payload.get("task_id") or "").strip()
+    assert task_id
+    assert payload.get("result_url") == f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/result"
+    assert payload.get("status_url") == f"/api/tasks/{task_id}"
+    assert "openclaw_result_url" not in payload
+
+    submit_payload = captured_submit.get("payload") or {}
+    assert submit_payload.get("task_type") == "video"
+    metadata = submit_payload.get("metadata") or {}
+    assert metadata.get("source") == "clonecut_upload"
+    assert metadata.get("uploaded_via") == "api_multipart"
+    assert metadata.get("original_filename") == "upload-source.mp4"
*** End Patch

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-166/test_api_video_upload_uses_can0')

    def test_api_video_upload_uses_canonical_urls_and_platform_neutral_default_source(
        monkeypatch, tmp_path
    ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "api_upload_video.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
        captured_submit: dict[str, object] = {}
    
        def _fake_submit(payload):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured_submit["payload"] = payload
            return True, str(payload.get("task_id") or ""), ""
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(service, "submit", _fake_submit)
        app = create_app(service)
        client = app.test_client()
    
        video = tmp_path / "upload-source.mp4"
        video.write_bytes(b"video")
    
        with video.open("rb") as handle:
            response = client.post(
                "/api/tasks/video",
                data={
                    "file": (handle, "upload-source.mp4"),
                },
                content_type="multipart/form-data",
            )
    
        assert response.status_code == 201
        payload = response.get_json() or {}
        task_id = str(payload.get("task_id") or "").strip()
        assert task_id
        assert payload.get("result_url") == f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/result"
        assert payload.get("status_url") == f"/api/tasks/{task_id}"
        assert "openclaw_result_url" not in payload
    
        submit_payload = captured_submit.get("payload") or {}
        assert submit_payload.get("task_type") == "video"
        metadata = submit_payload.get("metadata") or {}
>       assert metadata.get("source") == "clonecut_upload"

Output:
# 项目待办

## 绑定信息
- 目标版本: goal_v2
- 待办版本: v2_3
- 创建日期: 2026-03-27
- 状态: 当前生效

## 当前阶段结论
- 方案B已确定为当前执行路线：以 `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` 作为唯一生产主链，禁止旧架构级兜底，禁止长期双轨运行。
- 当前阻塞点不是 OpenClaw 接口层，而是内置视频流水线本体未完成：`domain/video/pipeline.py` 依赖的 `domain/video/stages/` 缺失。
- 上一阶段成果已独立提交并推送：`9a0d91a feat: add warm internal pipeline runner`。
- Redis 继续采用宿主机服务化方式，不以 Docker 部署为未来前提。
- 当前测试已锁定的 `strict_rejected`、`timeline_fallback`、`copy_fallback`、`rule_based` 等行为，在等价替代契约落地前继续按正式运行时保护处理，不视为旧架构兜底。
- OpenClaw 只是第一层 skill 适配平台，不是系统唯一宿主；方案B新增明确三层结构：平台无关核心能力层、API/CLI 通用入口层、Skill/Wrapper 适配层。
- 平台无关入口阶段已固定口径：直接落 canonical API/CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点，不保留长期 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 兼容层。

## 里程碑
- [x] 完成 OpenClaw 第一版与现有 `pre` 生产链的端到端打通
- [x] 完成 warm runner 试验并独立提交归档
- [x] 明确当前核心目的：用户经 OpenClaw 提交视频，CloneCut 完成“去气口/重复内容 -> 剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面 -> 回传产物”
- [x] 输出方案B实施方案文档与执行待办清单
- [ ] 重建 `domain/video/stages/` 并恢复 `VideoPipeline` 可运行骨架
- [ ] 将 worker 真实执行路径切换到 `VideoPipeline`
- [ ] 用 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 完成 OpenClaw 新主链 smoke test
- [ ] 下线旧 `pre` 主链的运行时依赖

## 当前进行中
- 方案B Phase 4 已完成并通过稳定性验收：worker 常驻资源治理、ready gate、失败后重建与并发治理已落地；`test.mp4` 顺序 3 次、并发 2 次验收通过。
- 当前进入 方案B Phase 5：建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，把标准结果对象收敛为 `task_result`，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点。

## 已完成
- 已确认当前真实运行链仍由 `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py` 驱动，OpenClaw 已可通过现有 API/worker 跑通真实 `test.mp4`。
- 已在 Windows 宿主机安装并跑通本地 Redis，当前 API 已运行在 Redis 队列/注册模式。
- 已完成结果协议首轮收敛，OpenClaw 可获取 `openclaw_result` 与关键 artifacts。
- 已验证 warm runner 能显著减少“每任务重新起解释器”的额外开销，但该方案仅作为上一阶段试验结果保留，不进入方案B主设计。
- 已重建 `.venv-p310` 运行环境，并修复旧 `pre` 内置流水线在新环境下的两个关键运行时问题：子进程输出编码导致的 warm runner 失败，以及 `ffmpeg` 隐式路径依赖导致的 step6 中断；`test.mp4` 已于 2026-03-27 通过 OpenClaw -> CloneCut -> 回传链路再次验证，结果为 `executed_mode=real_pipeline`。
- 已完成 worker 常驻资源治理稳定性收口：新增 runtime 预热、ready gate、失败后失效重建、停止时 readiness 清理，并于 2026-03-29 用 `test.mp4` 完成顺序 3 次 + 并发 2 次验收，结果稳定为 `executed_mode=video_pipeline`。

## 待完成
- 重建 `domain/video/stages/base.py`、`utils.py` 与各 stage 模块，恢复 `domain.video.pipeline` 的可导入与可测试状态。
- 对照 `domain/video/pre/stage/*` 迁移主链算法，去除交互式输入和脚本式副作用。
- 将 ASR、VideoClipper、字幕处理、封面渲染等重资源收敛为 worker 进程内常驻资源，并补齐并发治理与 ready 信号。
- 修改 `apps/worker/service.py`，让通用视频任务主路径直接调用 `VideoPipeline`。
- 建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
- 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为平台中立的 `task_result`，并补齐 schema/契约测试。
- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用 canonical API/CLI，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
- 用 OpenClaw 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
- 清理旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 在 worker 主路径上的运行时依赖，并单独决策 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是迁移期兼容还是正式废弃。

## 后置优化待办
- `fast` / `standard` / `full` 执行档位
- 自然语言到结构化执行选项映射
- “只剪辑、不加字幕、不加封面”等用户控制能力
- 封面标题生成策略细化
- 更细粒度的性能指标与批处理优化

 154: 
 155: ## Phase 4：切换 worker 主执行路径
 156: 
 157: 涉及文件：
 158: 
 159: - [ ] `apps/worker/service.py`
 160: - [ ] 相关 API 结果聚合文件
 161: - [ ] 相关测试文件
 162: - [ ] 相关配置样例与迁移说明
 163: 
 164: 执行要求：
 165: 
 166: - [ ] worker 真实视频任务直接调用 `VideoPipeline`
 167: - [ ] `executed_mode` 与产物协议反映新主链
 168: - [ ] `openclaw_result` 不再依赖旧 `pre` 主链内部约定
 169: - [ ] 清理对 `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` 的主路径依赖
 170: - [ ] `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 不再进入通用视频主链
 171: - [ ] 明确 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是“迁移期兼容”还是“正式废弃”
 172: - [ ] 为 `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest` 增加 `schema_version` 与必填字段约束
 173: - [ ] 补 OpenClaw 结果契约测试
 174: 
 175: 验收：
 176: 
 177: - [ ] 真实任务能在不调用旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 的情况下完成
 178: - [ ] 任务状态、artifacts、下载接口都保持可用
 179: - [ ] 通用视频主链不再经过 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`
 180: - [ ] 结果 schema 变更可被契约测试拦住
 181: 
 182: ## Phase 5：建立平台无关通用入口
 183: 
 184: 涉及文件：
 185: 
 186: - [ ] `apps/api/*`
 187: - [ ] `scripts/*` 或 CLI 入口文件
 188: - [ ] 相关结果 schema / 契约测试文件
 189: 
 190: 执行要求：
 191: 
 192: - [ ] 提供稳定 canonical HTTP API 供外部平台调用
 193: - [ ] 提供稳定 canonical CLI 命令供 shell skill / wrapper 调用
 194: - [ ] 外部平台不需要直接依赖内部 Python 模块结构
 195: - [ ] `task_result` / `render_manifest` 明确 `schema_version`
 196: - [ ] 结果必填字段和 artifacts 命名规则固化
 197: - [ ] canonical 视频上传路由固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`
 198: - [ ] canonical 结果读取路由固定为 `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
 199: - [ ] canonical Python 客户端固定为 `apps/api/task_client.py`
 200: - [ ] canonical CLI 固定为 `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
 201: - [ ] 仓库内 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点在本阶段同步迁移
 202: - [ ] 不保留长期 `openclaw_result` / `upload-video` 命名兼容层
 203: 
 204: 验收：
 205: 
 206: - [ ] 不同调用方可以通过同一入口提交任务并读取结果
 207: - [ ] 结果 schema 的破坏性变更可以被契约测试拦住
 208: 
 209: ## Phase 6：Skill / Wrapper 适配层
 210: 
 211: 涉及文件：
 212: 
 213: - [ ] `skills/*`
 214: - [ ] `scripts/*wrapper*`
 215: - [ ] 平台适配说明文档
 216: 
 217: 执行要求：
 218: 
 219: - [ ] OpenClaw skill 改为只调用通用 API/CLI
 220: - [ ] 保留 shell wrapper 作为通用 skill 载体
 221: - [ ] 预留 MCP / 其他 agent skill 的接入说明
 222: - [ ] skill 不直接依赖内部 stage 文件名、内部目录结构
 223: - [ ] skill / wrapper 不再直接消费 `openclaw_result`，统一消费 `task_result`
 224: 
 225: 验收：
 226: 
 227: - [ ] OpenClaw skill 不再直接耦合内部实现
 228: - [ ] 任何支持 skill/tool/shell 调用的平台都能复用同一入口
 229: 
 230: ## Phase 7：OpenClaw 端到端验证
 231: 
 232: 测试输入：
 233: 
 234: - [ ] `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`
 235: 
 236: 验证步骤：
 237: 
 238: - [ ] 通过 OpenClaw 上传视频
 239: - [ ] 通过 CloneCut API 创建任务
 240: - [ ] 观察 worker 进入 `VideoPipeline`
 241: - [ ] 检查每个关键 stage 的 manifest 与产物
 242: - [ ] 下载最终成片
 243: - [ ] 下载字幕、脚本、封面、日志
 244: 
 245: 验收：
 246: 
 247: - [ ] OpenClaw 能拿到完整 `openclaw_result`
 248: - [ ] 主成片、字幕、封面、脚本路径全部有效
 249: - [ ] 失败时可定位到具体 stage，而不是只看到进程级失败
 250: - [ ] worker 在 ready 后再开始消费视频任务
 251: 
 252: ## Phase 8：清理旧主链运行时依赖
 253: 
 254: - [ ] 从 worker 主路径移除旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 调用
 255: - [ ] 下线 `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` 的主用途

 201: - manifest 稳定
 202: - 错误可追踪
 203: 
 204: 建议统一落在：
 205: 
 206: - `StageResult`
 207: - `PipelineContext`
 208: - `PipelineArtifacts`
 209: - `render_manifest` / `openclaw_result`
 210: 
 211: ### 5.6 引擎边界原则
 212: 
 213: - `domain/video/pre/**` 是迁移来源，不是未来边界
 214: - `domain/video/funclip/**` 是阶段内部可替换引擎，不是 OpenClaw 直接依赖对象
 215: - OpenClaw 只依赖任务接口与结果接口，不依赖内部脚本文件名
 216: 
 217: ### 5.7 平台解耦原则
 218: 
 219: 平台解耦的核心要求是：
 220: 
 221: - OpenClaw 不直接依赖 `domain/video/*` 内部细节
 222: - skill 不直接依赖内部 stage 文件名
 223: - skill 不直接拼装内部目录结构
 224: - 任何平台都通过同一个通用入口调用 CloneCut
 225: 
 226: 因此主链应收敛成：
 227: 
 228: - 平台侧：skill/tool/wrapper
 229: - CloneCut 侧：API/CLI
 230: - 内部侧：worker/pipeline/stages
 231: 
 232: ### 5.8 执行路径收敛原则
 233: 
 234: 方案B要收敛的是 CloneCut 的通用视频任务主路径，不是一次性无说明地删除仓库里所有历史执行入口。
 235: 
 236: 这里先明确两层边界：
 237: 
 238: - CloneCut 的通用视频任务主路径：只允许走 `VideoPipeline`
 239: - 仓库级历史执行入口：例如 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`，需要单独声明是“迁移期兼容”还是“正式废弃”
 240: 
 241: 当前推荐口径是：
 242: 
 243: - `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 不再进入通用视频主链
 244: - 是否从整个仓库完全移除，作为单独迁移决策处理
 245: - 如果决定彻底废弃，必须在文档、配置和发布说明中明确这是一次有意的功能收缩，而不是无意回归
 246: 
 247: ### 5.9 平台中立原则
 248: 
 249: Redis 不与 Docker 强绑定。
 250: 
 251: 考虑到后续 OpenClaw 可能部署在苹果电脑上，方案B默认采用“宿主机服务化依赖”的思路：
 252: 
 253: - Redis 作为宿主机服务运行
 254: - CloneCut 与调用平台均通过配置连接 Redis
 255: - 不把 Redis 容器化作为架构前提
 256: 
 257: ## 6. 方案B目标架构
 258: 
 259: ```text
 260: 支持 skill/tool 的平台（OpenClaw / 其他 agent / MCP 调用方）
 261:   -> Skill / Wrapper / Tool Adapter
 262:   -> CloneCut 通用入口（HTTP API / CLI）
 263:   -> apps/worker/service.py
 264:   -> domain/video/pipeline.py
 265:   -> domain/video/stages/stage0~stage9
 266:   -> output/<task_id>/artifacts
 267:   -> 标准结果对象（openclaw_result / render_manifest / schema_version）
 268:   -> 调用方读取标准结果
 269: ```
 270: 
 271: 建议收敛后的职责分层如下：
 272: 
 273: ### 6.1 API / CLI 通用入口层
 274: 
 275: 负责：
 276: 
 277: - 接收视频上传
 278: - 创建任务
 279: - 查询任务状态
 280: - 下载主产物与 artifacts
 281: - 暴露统一结果对象
 282: - 作为 skill/tool 的稳定调用入口
 283: 
 284: 不负责：
 285: 
 286: - 拼装具体 stage 调用顺序
 287: - 处理旧脚本参数
 288: 
 289: 推荐 canonical 入口最小收敛为：
 290: 
 291: - `POST /api/tasks/video`：multipart 上传视频并创建标准任务
 292: - `POST /api/tasks`：JSON 任务创建接口，继续承载通用任务协议
 293: - `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>`：任务详情
 294: - `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`：平台中立标准结果对象 `task_result`
 295: - `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts` / `download`：产物与下载接口
 296: 
 297: 对应 canonical CLI：
 298: 
 299: - `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
 300: - `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
 301: 
 302: 这里的结果对象命名也应收敛为：
 303: 
 304: - `task_result`
 305: - 而不是 `openclaw_result`
 306: 
 307: ### 6.2 Worker 层
 308: 
 309: 负责：
 310:

 523: ### 阶段6：Skill 适配层落地
 524: 
 525: 目标：先提供 OpenClaw skill，再为其他平台预留复用方式。

 - 本阶段同步迁移仓库内已有 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点

+- 2026-03-29 首轮实现已落地：`POST /api/tasks/video`、`GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`、`apps/api/task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+- 2026-03-29 已删除仓库内旧 `openclaw_*` 专属 client / PowerShell 入口，skill 已切到 `task_result`
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v3.md
@@
 ## 当前进行中
 - 方案B Phase 4 已完成并通过稳定性验收：worker 常驻资源治理、ready gate、失败后重建与并发治理已落地；`test.mp4` 顺序 3 次、并发 2 次验收通过。
-- 当前进入 方案B Phase 5：建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，把标准结果对象收敛为 `task_result`，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw Python / PowerShell / skill 调用点。
+- 方案B Phase 5 首轮实现已落地：canonical API/CLI 已固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`、`GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`、`apps/api/task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`；仓库内旧 `openclaw_*` client / PowerShell 入口已移除，skill 已切到 `task_result`。
+- 当前收口任务：用 `test.mp4` 走一次 canonical API/CLI 与 OpenClaw skill 实烟，确认 `task_result` 字段稳定、不漂移，再回到 worker 主路径与旧 `pre` 依赖下线。
@@
 - 已重建 `.venv-p310` 运行环境，并修复旧 `pre` 内置流水线在新环境下的两个关键运行时问题：子进程输出编码导致的 warm runner 失败，以及 `ffmpeg` 隐式路径依赖导致的 step6 中断；`test.mp4` 已于 2026-03-27 通过 OpenClaw -> CloneCut -> 回传链路再次验证，结果为 `executed_mode=real_pipeline`。
 - 已完成 worker 常驻资源治理稳定性收口：新增 runtime 预热、ready gate、失败后失效重建、停止时 readiness 清理，并于 2026-03-29 用 `test.mp4` 完成顺序 3 次 + 并发 2 次验收，结果稳定为 `executed_mode=video_pipeline`。
+- 已完成平台中立入口首轮落地：API 新增 `/api/tasks/video` 与 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`，任务详情统一暴露 `result_url` / `task_result`，并新增 `apps/api/task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`。
+- 已完成仓库内 OpenClaw 入口迁移：`skills/clonecut-video-pipeline` 已改为消费 canonical API/CLI 与 `task_result`；旧 `apps/api/openclaw_client.py`、`scripts/openclaw_task_client.py`、`scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1`、`tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` 已删除。
+- 已补 canonical 契约回归：新增/更新 `tests/unit/test_task_client.py` 与 `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`，覆盖 `task_result`、canonical 路由与 `clonecut_upload` 默认来源。
@@
 - 将 ASR、VideoClipper、字幕处理、封面渲染等重资源收敛为 worker 进程内常驻资源，并补齐并发治理与 ready 信号。
 - 修改 `apps/worker/service.py`，让通用视频任务主路径直接调用 `VideoPipeline`。
-- 建立 canonical API/CLI 通用入口，让任何支持 skill/tool/shell/MCP 的平台都可以复用 CloneCut 能力。
-- 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为平台中立的 `task_result`，并补齐 schema/契约测试。
-- 让 OpenClaw skill 改为调用 canonical API/CLI，而不是直接绑定内部实现；并预留其他平台 skill/wrapper 的接入方式。
-- 用 OpenClaw 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
+- 用 canonical API/CLI + OpenClaw skill 重新完成 `test.mp4` 端到端验证，并确认主成片、字幕、封面、脚本、日志回传稳定。
+- 继续补齐 `task_result` / `render_manifest` 的必填字段与 schema 契约，避免后续结果字段漂移。
+- 补平台适配说明，明确 MCP / 其他 agent skill 如何复用 canonical 入口。
 - 清理旧 `pre/main/pipeline.py` 在 worker 主路径上的运行时依赖，并单独决策 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` 是迁移期兼容还是正式废弃。
*** End Patch

*** Add File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\docs\superpowers\plans\2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry.md
+# Platform-Neutral Entry Implementation Plan
+
+> Execution log for Phase 5. We are landing CloneCut's canonical API/CLI boundary and removing OpenClaw-specific protocol ownership from the core system.
+
+**Goal:** 将 CloneCut 外部入口收敛为平台中立的 canonical API / CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点。  
+**Architecture:** 继续复用现有 `/api/tasks` 资源模型，在其上增加 canonical 视频上传与 canonical 结果读取；以 `task_result` 取代 `openclaw_result` 作为标准返回对象，并用平台中立 Python client / CLI 承载外部调用。  
+**Tech Stack:** Flask, Python argparse, PowerShell wrapper, Node helper, existing WorkerService task/result schema
+
+---
+
+### Task 1: 更新文档与活动待办
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `docs/方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md`
+- Modify: `docs/方案B执行待办清单.md`
+- Modify: `Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v3.md`
+- Create: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry-design.md`
+
+- [x] 记录 canonical API / CLI 方案与“不保留长期兼容层”的执行口径
+- [x] 将当前进行中切换到 Phase 5：canonical entry
+
+### Task 2: 先写 canonical API / client 失败测试
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
+- Replace: `tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` -> `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`
+
+- [x] 先让 API 测试要求 `result_url` / `task_result` / `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [x] 先让 client 测试要求 `/api/tasks/video` 和 `task_result`
+- [x] 运行定向测试，确认旧实现确实失败过
+
+### Task 3: 实现 canonical API
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `apps/api/main.py`
+
+- [x] 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为 `task_result`
+- [x] 将 canonical 结果路由固定为 `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [x] 将 canonical 视频上传路由固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`
+- [x] 任务详情返回 `result_url` 与 `task_result`
+- [x] 上传任务默认来源改为平台中立的 `clonecut_upload`
+
+### Task 4: 实现 canonical Python client / CLI
+**Files:**
+- Create: `apps/api/task_client.py`
+- Create: `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+- Create: `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+
+- [x] 提供提交、轮询、读取结果的统一 client
+- [x] CLI 只做薄包装，不再带 OpenClaw 命名
+
+### Task 5: 迁移仓库内适配层调用点
+**Files:**
+- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/SKILL.md`
+- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/run_clonecut_task.mjs`
+- Delete: `apps/api/openclaw_client.py`
+- Delete: `scripts/openclaw_task_client.py`
+- Delete: `scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1`
+- Delete: `tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py`
+
+- [x] skill 适配层切到 canonical API / CLI
+- [x] skill 文档改为消费 `task_result`
+- [x] 删除仓库内旧 OpenClaw 专属 Python / PowerShell client 入口
+
+### Task 6: 验证
+**Files:**
+- Verify only
+
+- [x] 跑 API / client 相关测试
+- [ ] 跑一次真实 `test.mp4` API/CLI 验证
+- [ ] 记录结论与剩余风险
+
+## Verification Log
+
+- 2026-03-29: `d:\clonecut\.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest -q tests/unit/test_task_client.py tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
+  - Result: `10 passed`
+- 2026-03-29: 新增上传契约测试，确认 `/api/tasks/video` 返回 canonical `result_url`，并且默认来源改为 `clonecut_upload`
+
+## Remaining Work
+
+- 用 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 跑一次 canonical API/CLI 实烟
+- 用 OpenClaw skill 再跑一次真实链路，确认拿到的是 `task_result`
+- 继续补齐 `task_result` / `render_manifest` 的更完整 schema 契约
*** End Patch

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.3 seconds Output: app: name: clonecut env: production role: worker host: 0.0.0.0 port: 8205 redis: host: 127.0.0.1 port: 6379 db: 0 password: "" namesp...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
