Output:
app:
  name: clonecut
  env: production
  role: worker
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8205

redis:
  host: 127.0.0.1
  port: 6379
  db: 0
  password: ""
  namespace: "clonecut_worker:"

paths:
  input_dir: D:/clonecut/input
  output_dir: D:/clonecut/output
  log_dir: D:/clonecut/logs

queue:
  max_retries: 3
  retry_backoff_seconds: [5, 10, 20]
  dedup_ttl_seconds: 86400

worker:
  max_download_workers: 2
  max_process_workers: 2
  max_upload_workers: 2
  # Built-in TTS/voice-clone path. Enabled by default.
  tts_enable: true
  # local | http | auto (auto=local first then http fallback)
  tts_engine: "local"
  tts_default_voice: ""
  tts_local_sample_rate_hz: 24000
  # Optional HTTP bridge endpoint, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9000
  tts_api_endpoint: ""
  tts_api_timeout_seconds: 15
  # Optional external video processor command.
  # Available placeholders: {task_id} {source_url} {source_path} {output_dir} {output_file}
  video_command_template: ""
  video_command_timeout_seconds: 7200
  # Upload storage backend. Current supported value: local
  upload_storage_backend: "local"
  # Forum reply during upload stage. Only applies to video tasks carrying forum thread context.
  forum_upload_enabled: true
  forum_reply_content: "Video processing completed"
  forum_settings_path: "config/forum_settings.yaml"
  # Upload-stage retry backoff (seconds), used only for upload failures.
  upload_retry_backoff_seconds: [1, 2, 4]
  # Built-in stage pipeline switch (stage1~8). Enabled by default after B1 pass.
  use_internal_pipeline: true
  # Tiny-input migration fallback threshold in bytes. Set 0 to disable.
  internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0
  # Retry/Zombie background scheduler tuning.
  retry_check_interval_seconds: 1
  zombie_timeout_seconds: 7200
  zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds:
    pending: 7200
    downloading: 7200
    processing: 7200
    uploading: 7200
  zombie_check_interval_seconds: 300

monitor:
  dispatch_interval_seconds: 2
  health_check_interval_seconds: 10
  # legacy key alias, same meaning as health_check_interval_seconds
  check_interval_seconds: 10
  dispatch_timeout_seconds: 5
  forum_discovery_enabled: true
  forum_check_interval_seconds: 10

llm:
  # Supported providers: rule/openai/deepseek/qwen/kimi/g4f
  provider: "rule"
  # Provider-specific model name. Keep empty to let adapters use their defaults.
  model: ""
  # API key for remote providers. Not required for `rule`.
  api_key: ""
  # Optional provider endpoint override (compatible OpenAI base URL).
  base_url: ""
  # Stream output switch for adapters implementing stream_call.
  stream: false
  # Request timeout in seconds.
  timeout_seconds: 25.0

Output:
True
app:
  name: clonecut
  env: production
  role: worker
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8205

api:
  # API process should only expose HTTP endpoints by default.
  # Actual task execution runs in the dedicated worker service on port 8205.
  start_worker: false

redis:
  host: 127.0.0.1
  port: 6379
  db: 0
  password: ""
  namespace: "clonecut_worker:"

paths:
  input_dir: D:/clonecut/input
  output_dir: D:/clonecut/output
  log_dir: D:/clonecut/logs

queue:
  max_retries: 3
  retry_backoff_seconds: [5, 10, 20]
  dedup_ttl_seconds: 86400

worker:
  max_download_workers: 2
  max_process_workers: 2
  max_upload_workers: 2
  # Built-in TTS/voice-clone path. Enabled by default.
  tts_enable: true
  # local | http | auto (auto=local first then http fallback)
  tts_engine: "local"
  tts_default_voice: ""
  tts_local_sample_rate_hz: 24000
  # Optional HTTP bridge endpoint, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9000
  tts_api_endpoint: ""
  tts_api_timeout_seconds: 15
  # Optional external video processor command.
  # Available placeholders: {task_id} {source_url} {source_path} {output_dir} {output_file}
  video_command_template: ""
  video_command_timeout_seconds: 7200
  # Upload storage backend. Current supported value: local
  upload_storage_backend: "local"
  # Forum reply during upload stage. Only applies to video tasks carrying forum thread context.
  forum_upload_enabled: true
  forum_reply_content: "Video processing completed"
  forum_settings_path: "config/forum_settings.yaml"
  # Upload-stage retry backoff (seconds), used only for upload failures.
  upload_retry_backoff_seconds: [1, 2, 4]
  # Built-in stage pipeline switch (stage1~8). Enabled by default after B1 pass.
  use_internal_pipeline: true
  # subprocess | warm_process
  internal_pipeline_runner: "warm_process"
  internal_pipeline_pool_size: 1
  internal_pipeline_warmup_on_start: true
  # Retry/Zombie background scheduler tuning.
  retry_check_interval_seconds: 1
  zombie_timeout_seconds: 7200
  zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds:
    pending: 7200
    downloading: 7200
    processing: 7200
    uploading: 7200
  zombie_check_interval_seconds: 300

monitor:
  dispatch_interval_seconds: 2
  health_check_interval_seconds: 10
  # legacy key alias, same meaning as health_check_interval_seconds
  check_interval_seconds: 10
  dispatch_timeout_seconds: 5
  forum_discovery_enabled: true
  forum_check_interval_seconds: 10

llm:
  # Supported providers: rule/openai/deepseek/qwen/kimi/g4f
  provider: "rule"
  # Provider-specific model name. Keep empty to let adapters use their defaults.
  model: ""
  # API key for remote providers. Not required for `rule`.
  api_key: ""
  # Optional provider endpoint override (compatible OpenAI base URL).
  base_url: ""
  # Stream output switch for adapters implementing stream_call.
  stream: false
  # Request timeout in seconds.
  timeout_seconds: 25.0

Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\tests\unit\test_task_client.py
@@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 from pathlib import Path
+import subprocess
+import sys
 
 import pytest
@@
 def test_submit_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
     missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
     with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
         submit_video_task(
             api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
             video_path=missing,
         )
+
+
+def test_clonecut_task_client_cli_help_runs_from_repo_root() -> None:
+    repo_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
+    script_path = repo_root / "scripts" / "clonecut_task_client.py"
+
+    completed = subprocess.run(
+        [sys.executable, str(script_path), "--help"],
+        cwd=repo_root,
+        capture_output=True,
+        text=True,
+        check=False,
+    )
+
+    assert completed.returncode == 0, completed.stderr
+    assert "Submit CloneCut video task" in completed.stdout
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\.worktrees\smoke-test-mp4\scripts\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1
@@
-$repoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
-$pythonBin = Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe"
+$repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
 $clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\clonecut_task_client.py"
+$pythonCandidates = @(
+    (Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe")
+)
+
+try {
+    $gitCommonDir = (& git -C $repoRoot rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>$null).Trim()
+    if ($gitCommonDir) {
+        $sharedRepoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $gitCommonDir
+        $sharedPython = Join-Path $sharedRepoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe"
+        if ($sharedPython -notin $pythonCandidates) {
+            $pythonCandidates += $sharedPython
+        }
+    }
+} catch {
+}
+
+$pythonBin = $pythonCandidates | Where-Object { Test-Path -LiteralPath $_ } | Select-Object -First 1
 
-if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $pythonBin)) {
-    throw "missing python: $pythonBin"
+if (-not $pythonBin) {
+    throw "missing python runtime: expected one of $($pythonCandidates -join ', ')"
 }
*** End Patch

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import logging
import os
from typing import Any
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    @app.get("/")
    def dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/web/worker")
    def worker_dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/health")
    def health() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"status": "ok"})

    @app.get("/ready")
    def ready() -> Any:
        payload = service.get_readiness()
        status_code = 200 if payload.get("ready") else 503
        return jsonify(payload), status_code

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/status")
    def mock_worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **build_worker_status()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/resources")
    def mock_worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": build_worker_resources()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_tasks() -> Any:
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "10")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
        except ValueError:
            limit = 10
        tasks = build_worker_tasks(limit=limit)
        return jsonify({"success": True, "tasks": tasks, "total": len(tasks), "limit": limit, "offset": 0})

    @app.post("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_submit() -> Any:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        source_url = str(payload.get("source_url", "")).strip()
        if not source_url:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "missing source_url"}), 400
        task_id = f"mock-submit-{datetime.now().strftime('%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.post("/api/worker/receive-task")
    def receive_task() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"})

    def _list_tasks_impl() -> Any:
        status = request.args.get("status")
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
        offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
            offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400

        try:
            payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})

    def _create_task_impl() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"}), 201

    @app.get("/api/worker/status")
    def worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/status")
    def status_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/worker/resources")
    def worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/resources")
    def resources_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_tasks() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.get("/api/tasks")
    def tasks_compat() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.post("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_create_task() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.post("/api/tasks")
    def create_task_compat() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.get("/api/worker/task/<task_id>")
    def worker_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut worker service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "worker"
    if args.port:
        cfg.port = args.port
    if args.host:
        cfg.host = args.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.worker")
    logger.info("worker booting")
    logger.info("env=%s role=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.role, cfg.host, cfg.port)
    logger.info(
        "redis=%s:%s db=%s ns=%s",
        cfg.redis_host,
        cfg.redis_port,
        cfg.redis_db,
        cfg.redis_namespace,
    )

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    service.start()
    app = create_app(service)

    _run_http(app=app, host=cfg.host, port=cfg.port, logger=logger)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$repo = 'd:\\clonecut\\.worktrees\\smoke-test-mp4'\n$python = 'd:\\clonecut\\.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$config = 'd:\\clonecut\\config\\settings.yaml'\n$tmp = Join-Path $repo '.tmp_phase5_smoke'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $tmp | Out-Null\n$env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = Join-Path $tmp 'phase5_smoke.db'\n$env:PYTHONIOENCODING = 'utf-8'\n$workerOut = Join-Path $tmp 'worker.out.log'\n$workerErr = Join-Path $tmp 'worker.err.log'\n$apiOut = Join-Path $tmp 'api.out.log'\n$apiErr = Join-Path $tmp 'api.err.log'\n$worker = $null\n$api = $null\nfunction Stop-Proc($proc) {\n  if ($null -ne $proc -and -not $proc.HasExited) {\n    Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force\n    Start-Sleep -Seconds 1\n  }\n}\nfunction Wait-Http200([string]$url, [int]$timeoutSec, $workerProc, $apiProc) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    if ($null -ne $workerProc -and $workerProc.HasExited) {\n      throw \"worker exited early with code $($workerProc.ExitCode)\"\n    }\n    if ($null -ne $apiProc -and $apiProc.HasExited) {\n      throw \"api exited early with code $($apiProc.ExitCode)\"\n    }\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      if ($resp.StatusCode -ge 200 -and $resp.StatusCode -lt 300) {\n        return $resp\n      }\n    } catch {\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url\"\n}\ntry {\n  $worker = Start-Process -FilePath $python -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$config,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port','18205') -WorkingDirectory $repo -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr -PassThru\n  Wait-Http200 'http://127.0.0.1:18205/health' 60 $worker $null | Out-Null\n  Wait-Http200 'http://127.0.0.1:18205/ready' 300 $worker $null | Out-Null\n\n  $api = Start-Process -FilePath $python -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$config,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port','18100') -WorkingDirectory $repo -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr -PassThru\n  Wait-Http200 'http://127.0.0.1:18100/health' 60 $worker $api | Out-Null\n\n  $smokeJson = Join-Path $tmp 'canonical-smoke.json'\n  $wrapper = Join-Path $repo 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1'\n  & powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $wrapper -VideoPath 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4' -ApiBase 'http://127.0.0.1:18100' -OutputJson $smokeJson | Out-Null\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {\n    throw \"smoke wrapper exited with code $LASTEXITCODE\"\n  }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw $smokeJson | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  $finalVideo = $taskResult.outputs.final_video\n  $subtitle = $taskResult.outputs.subtitle_srt\n  $cover = $taskResult.outputs.cover_image\n  $clipText = $taskResult.outputs.clip_text\n\n  \"task_id=$($payload.submit.task_id)\"\n  \"status=$($taskResult.status)\"\n  \"executed_mode=$($taskResult.executed_mode)\"\n  \"schema_version=$($taskResult.schema_version)\"\n  \"result_url=$($payload.submit.result_url)\"\n  \"final_video=$($finalVideo.filename)\"\n  \"subtitle_srt=$($subtitle.filename)\"\n  \"cover_image=$($cover.filename)\"\n  \"clip_text=$($clipText.filename)\"\n  \"smoke_json=$smokeJson\"\n} finally {\n  Stop-Proc $api\n  Stop-Proc $worker\n}\nif (Test-Path $workerErr) { $workerErrText = (Get-Content -Raw $workerErr).Trim(); if ($workerErrText) { \"worker_err=$workerErrText\" } }\nif (Test-Path $apiErr) { $apiErrText = (Get-Content -Raw $apiErr).Trim(); if ($apiErrText) { \"api_err=$apiErrText\" } }",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut\\.worktrees\\smoke-test-mp4",
  "timeout_ms": 3600000
}

Wall time: 0.3 seconds
Output:
---
name: requesting-code-review
description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
---

# Requesting Code Review

Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade. The reviewer gets precisely crafted context for evaluation 鈥?never your session's history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the work product, not your thought process, and preserves your own context for continued work.

**Core principle:** Review early, review often.

## When to Request Review

**Mandatory:**
- After each task in subagent-driven development
- After completing major feature
- Before merge to main

**Optional but valuable:**
- When stuck (fresh perspective)
- Before refactoring (baseline check)
- After fixing complex bug

## How to Request

**1. Get git SHAs:**
```bash
BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD~1)  # or origin/main
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
```

**2. Dispatch code-reviewer subagent:**

Use Task tool with superpowers:code-reviewer type, fill template at `code-reviewer.md`

**Placeholders:**
- `{WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED}` - What you just built
- `{PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS}` - What it should do
- `{BASE_SHA}` - Starting commit
- `{HEAD_SHA}` - Ending commit
- `{DESCRIPTION}` - Brief summary

**3. Act on feedback:**
- Fix Critical issues immediately
- Fix Important issues before proceeding
- Note Minor issues for later
- Push back if reviewer is wrong (with reasoning)

## Example

```
[Just completed Task 2: Add verification function]

You: Let me request code review before proceeding.

BASE_SHA=$(git log --oneline | grep "Task 1" | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)

[Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent]
  WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED: Verification and repair functions for conversation index
  PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS: Task 2 from docs/superpowers/plans/deployment-plan.md
  BASE_SHA: a7981ec
  HEAD_SHA: 3df7661
  DESCRIPTION: Added verifyIndex() and repairIndex() with 4 issue types

[Subagent returns]:
  Strengths: Clean architecture, real tests
  Issues:
    Important: Missing progress indicators
    Minor: Magic number (100) for reporting interval
  Assessment: Ready to proceed

You: [Fix progress indicators]
[Continue to Task 3]
```

## Integration with Workflows

**Subagent-Driven Development:**
- Review after EACH task
- Catch issues before they compound
- Fix before moving to next task

**Executing Plans:**
- Review after each batch (3 tasks)
- Get feedback, apply, continue

**Ad-Hoc Development:**
- Review before merge
- Review when stuck

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Skip review because "it's simple"
- Ignore Critical issues
- Proceed with unfixed Important issues
- Argue with valid technical feedback

**If reviewer wrong:**
- Push back with technical reasoning
- Show code/tests that prove it works
- Request clarification

See template at: requesting-code-review/code-reviewer.md

 ## 当前进行中
 - 方案B Phase 4 已完成并通过稳定性验收：worker 常驻资源治理、ready gate、失败后重建与并发治理已落地；`test.mp4` 顺序 3 次、并发 2 次验收通过。
 - 方案B Phase 5 首轮实现已落地：canonical API/CLI 已固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`、`GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`、`apps/api/task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`；仓库内旧 `openclaw_*` client / PowerShell 入口已移除，skill 已切到 `task_result`。
-- 当前收口任务：用 `test.mp4` 走一次 canonical API/CLI 与 OpenClaw skill 实烟，确认 `task_result` 字段稳定、不漂移，再回到 worker 主路径与旧 `pre` 依赖下线。
+- 当前收口任务：继续用 OpenClaw skill 跑一次真实链路，确认它通过 canonical 入口稳定拿到 `task_result`；随后回到 worker 主路径切换与旧 `pre` 依赖下线。

 - 已完成仓库内 OpenClaw 入口迁移：`skills/clonecut-video-pipeline` 已改为消费 canonical API/CLI 与 `task_result`；旧 `apps/api/openclaw_client.py`、`scripts/openclaw_task_client.py`、`scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1`、`tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` 已删除。
 - 已补 canonical 契约回归：新增/更新 `tests/unit/test_task_client.py` 与 `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`，覆盖 `task_result`、canonical 路由与 `clonecut_upload` 默认来源。
+- 已于 2026-03-29 用 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 完成 canonical CLI 实烟：通过 worktree 中的 API/worker + `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1` 返回 `task_result`，结果 `status=completed`、`executed_mode=video_pipeline`，主成片、字幕、封面、clip_text 全部回传成功。
@@

 - 继续补齐 `task_result` / `render_manifest` 的必填字段与 schema 契约，避免后续结果字段漂移。

# Platform-Neutral Entry Implementation Plan

> Execution log for Phase 5. We are landing CloneCut's canonical API/CLI boundary and removing OpenClaw-specific protocol ownership from the core system.

**Goal:** 灏?CloneCut 澶栭儴鍏ュ彛鏀舵暃涓哄钩鍙颁腑绔嬬殑 canonical API / CLI锛屽苟鍚屾杩佺Щ浠撳簱鍐?OpenClaw 璋冪敤鐐广€? 
**Architecture:** 缁х画澶嶇敤鐜版湁 `/api/tasks` 璧勬簮妯″瀷锛屽湪鍏朵笂澧炲姞 canonical 瑙嗛涓婁紶涓?canonical 缁撴灉璇诲彇锛涗互 `task_result` 鍙栦唬 `openclaw_result` 浣滀负鏍囧噯杩斿洖瀵硅薄锛屽苟鐢ㄥ钩鍙颁腑绔?Python client / CLI 鎵胯浇澶栭儴璋冪敤銆? 
**Tech Stack:** Flask, Python argparse, PowerShell wrapper, Node helper, existing WorkerService task/result schema

---

### Task 1: 鏇存柊鏂囨。涓庢椿鍔ㄥ緟鍔?**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/鏂规B-鍐呯疆瑙嗛娴佹按绾块噸寤轰笌OpenClaw涓婚摼鍒囨崲鏂规.md`
- Modify: `docs/鏂规B鎵ц寰呭姙娓呭崟.md`
- Modify: `Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v3.md`
- Create: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry-design.md`

- [x] 璁板綍 canonical API / CLI 鏂规涓庘€滀笉淇濈暀闀挎湡鍏煎灞傗€濈殑鎵ц鍙ｅ緞
- [x] 灏嗗綋鍓嶈繘琛屼腑鍒囨崲鍒?Phase 5锛歝anonical entry

### Task 2: 鍏堝啓 canonical API / client 澶辫触娴嬭瘯
**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
- Replace: `tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` -> `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`

- [x] 鍏堣 API 娴嬭瘯瑕佹眰 `result_url` / `task_result` / `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
- [x] 鍏堣 client 娴嬭瘯瑕佹眰 `/api/tasks/video` 鍜?`task_result`
- [x] 杩愯瀹氬悜娴嬭瘯锛岀‘璁ゆ棫瀹炵幇纭疄澶辫触杩?
### Task 3: 瀹炵幇 canonical API
**Files:**

- [x] 灏嗘爣鍑嗙粨鏋滃璞′粠 `openclaw_result` 鏀舵暃涓?`task_result`

- [x] 鍒犻櫎浠撳簱鍐呮棫 OpenClaw 涓撳睘 Python / PowerShell client 鍏ュ彛

### Task 6: 楠岃瘉

{
  "command": "@'\nfrom pathlib import Path\ncontent = '''# Platform-Neutral Entry Implementation Plan\n\n> Execution log for Phase 5. We are landing CloneCut's canonical API/CLI boundary and removing OpenClaw-specific protocol ownership from the core system.\n\n**Goal:** 将 CloneCut 外部入口收敛为平台中立的 canonical API / CLI，并同步迁移仓库内 OpenClaw 调用点。  \n**Architecture:** 继续复用现有 `/api/tasks` 资源模型，在其上增加 canonical 视频上传与 canonical 结果读取；以 `task_result` 取代 `openclaw_result` 作为标准返回对象，并用平台中立 Python client / CLI 承载外部调用。  \n**Tech Stack:** Flask, Python argparse, PowerShell wrapper, Node helper, existing WorkerService task/result schema\n\n---\n\n### Task 1: 更新文档与活动待办\n**Files:**\n- Modify: `docs/方案B-内置视频流水线重建与OpenClaw主链切换方案.md`\n- Modify: `docs/方案B执行待办清单.md`\n- Modify: `Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v3.md`\n- Create: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-29-platform-neutral-entry-design.md`\n\n- [x] 记录 canonical API / CLI 方案与“不保留长期兼容层”的执行口径\n- [x] 将当前进行中切换到 Phase 5：canonical entry\n\n### Task 2: 先写 canonical API / client 失败测试\n**Files:**\n- Modify: `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`\n- Replace: `tests/unit/test_openclaw_client.py` -> `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`\n\n- [x] 先让 API 测试要求 `result_url` / `task_result` / `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`\n- [x] 先让 client 测试要求 `/api/tasks/video` 和 `task_result`\n- [x] 运行定向测试，确认旧实现确实失败过\n\n### Task 3: 实现 canonical API\n**Files:**\n- Modify: `apps/api/main.py`\n\n- [x] 将标准结果对象从 `openclaw_result` 收敛为 `task_result`\n- [x] 将 canonical 结果路由固定为 `GET /api/tasks/<task_id>/result`\n- [x] 将 canonical 视频上传路由固定为 `POST /api/tasks/video`\n- [x] 任务详情返回 `result_url` 与 `task_result`\n- [x] 上传任务默认来源改为平台中立的 `clonecut_upload`\n\n### Task 4: 实现 canonical Python client / CLI\n**Files:**\n- Create: `apps/api/task_client.py`\n- Create: `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`\n- Create: `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`\n\n- [x] 提供提交、轮询、读取结果的统一 client\n- [x] CLI 只做薄包装，不再带 OpenClaw 命名\n\n### Task 5: 迁移仓库内适配层调用点\n**Files:**\n- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/SKILL.md`\n- Modify: `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/run_clonecut_task.mjs`\n- Delete:
